reviews.text: Jason Brandeis recently assisted me with a legal matter with my business I own and I could not be more pleased with the outcome. He is prompt with communication, knowledgable, professional and an extremely experienced lawyer. I will absolutely be recommending him to everyone I know! Thanks again, Jason.
Website was okay. Could use some more information and examples of successful outcomes related to their company.

I have tried to contact them several times regarding a case and I have not received a call back. I find that to be unprofessional. How are things to be resolved if there is not an open line of communication?
reviews.ownerResponse: I apologize, we are not showing you as a client at our firm. Can you please email us at info@bhb.com so we can ensure we have the correct contact name and phone number to reach you?

reviews.text: Birch Horton Bittner & Cherot is always great to work with and consistently provide wonderful customer service!
Wonderful law firm. Best attorneys in Anchorage.

Shakespeare erred in writing “the first thing we do, let’s kill all the lawyers,” insofar as it fails to exclude the attorneys of Dresner Zelinsky. The firm’s reflections on criminal defense are fairly routine but their results overwhelm any competing practice with considerable favor. However, one doesn’t need to dig deep to find the bedrock of their success. These men are witty, diligent, and unrelenting in their integrity and client advocacy. The considerable beauty of such traits translates into an admirably trenchant two-man operation that is personal and powerful.

I can earnestly say, from personal experience, that these are the attorneys you want on your side. Their pale ghost-like complexion reflects their strong commitment to client success and working inside on sunny days. While they may lack the ability to hunt or fish, they more than make up for it in the courtroom. If they can win murder cases, they can win your case.
Both Mr. Zelinsky and Mr. Dresner are very knoweldge able. John is very compationate and patient.

Motivated, dedicated professionals who listen to you. They both have a great deal of experience in criminal defense and are very knowledgeable in Alaska's criminal code. If it can be done they'll find a way.
Every individual I have referred to her involving a complex criminal matter has had very good results.

Cashion Gilmore & Lindemuth has a well-earned reputation for the utmost professionalism and effective advocacy for its clients.  The attorneys who work for Cashion Gilmore & Lindemuth are a credit to the Alaska Bar Association.

Cashion Gilmore & Lindemuth is a power house of a law firm with truly talented, dedicated, and honorable attorneys, each of whom do community work to make Alaska a better place. As a fellow attorney, I refer clients to Cashion Gilmore & Lindemuth on a regular basis.

Your firm's attorney, Mr. Kendall, is harassing me online. He is calling me antisemitic because he does not agree with my political views. I will make sure to never recommend anyone to your firm because of the conduct of Mr. Kendall. If this is how your attorneys act outside the courtroom I can only imagine how they conduct themselves inside the courtroom
I just called to ask if anyone there does consumer fraud cases and before I could even finish the question the receptionist rudely interrupted and said they don’t take those cases and hung up.

John represented me in a case involving a false DV claim.  I was charged with a felony.  The case was clearly made-up, and John got the DA to drop the charges once it was clear that there were no grounds for prosecution.  John was great; professional, clear, and cost effective.  He is one of the few attorneys who doesn't use up your retainer with unnecessary communication; he only called when there was new information to discuss.  I actually got a significant portion of my retainer refunded after the charges were dismissed.  I recommend him highly.

I called this office because they do “civil litigation”. Apparently though, they do not handle civil lawsuits if it is a malpractice case against another attorney.
They need to provide more in-depth information to the services they provide instead of simply “civil litigation”.
Attorney Matthews at Cashion Gillmore is highly skilled in all facets of her trade.  I could not have asked for better representation.  Thank you!
John and Chester are understanding and great to work with.  Very professional but down to earth too.

Under endless investigation for 6 years - threatened during interviews by Agents with charges and accusations that were rediculous I was compelled to hire a Criminal Law Firm, that Firm was Cashion Gilmore LLC.  Chester Gilmore was my attorney, he immediately met with the Agents and Prosecutor to find out how they viewed their case and in a series of meetings litigated the matter avoiding a Grand Jury and trial.  By this time I had retired and moved from Alaska, Chester's ability to communicate via email and phone during this 2+ year relationship left me secure in knowing he was representing me as I had hoped.  I recommend Cashion Gilmore LLC, they are professional and respectful.

I recently hired John to fight for me against a charge in Rural Alaska. He was eager to help and took the time to meet with me, explain my options and develop a strategy. He has an immense knowledge of how and what works coming for a background in prosecution. John fought to have my charges dropped and within weeks they were.

He was the ONLY state workmans comp lawyer to take my case. 4 other lawyers on the State of AK call list just gave me the runaround and were extremely dismissive and no help at all. But Michael seemed like he actually cared and was extremely helpful with my case. This is the lawyer you want for sure.

Marc June was my legal representative after I was in a motor vehicle accident in AK. After a previous lawyer was unable to follow through with my case, I was left feeling extremely confused about my circumstances. When I contacted Marc, he was eager and willing to help and was able to get my case back on track. He effectively communicated the details of the case to me in accessible terms and continued to check in with me periodically. I always felt in the loop about the status of the case and Marc always answered my questions and concerns whenever I called or emailed with him. The legal process can be very intimidating and stressful. I was lucky to have Marc assist me in this process.
What a fair, decent, hard working man! Helped me get long-sought-for justice for an injury.

My wife and I just successfully completed a three-year legal process.  It would not have been possible without the assistance of Marc June as our attorney.  The legal world is not a place to find yourself without a good guide, and Marc is the best. I cannot believe that our positive outcome would have been possible without him. He's the best.  Walter Corrigan

We have been working with Marc June since 2016 we just finished our case I couldn’t be more happier. Marc June is a great reliable, and honest lawyer That stays on top of your case and makes sure you understand what’s going on at all times with your case. I would recommend him to all.

I have very little experience with law and legal issues. I’ve never even contested a parking ticket, but when a car  accident left me injured and impaired and deeply impacted my family, I sought legal help with Marc June.
Marc helped me understand my rights, what was reasonable and fair to pursue, and then laid out a plan for how to do it. He listened to my ethical concerns, my fears about long term injury, and my reservations about going head to head with an insurance company, and he addressed all of them. He also is friendly, approachable and a cool guy to hang out with.
It was a slow process, but Marc was dogged in his work and guided me through what I needed to get done. I was nervous about the arbitration hearing, but Marc prepared me for it and when we got there it was clear that he was in familiar territory, and well-prepared for everything that the opposition threw at him. In the end, we prevailed, and I feel like I was well represented, and treated fairly by the arbitration process.
If you need an Alaskan attorney and are looking someone with skill and integrity, I think Marc June is your man.

A lawyer who is honest and hard working. I know, it's hard to believe but it is on the internet after all ;)

Scott

PS. This advertisement was "not" paid for by Mr. June.

I would like to highly recommend Marc June as an attorney in liability cases. In October 2016 Marc started representing me in an injury vehicle/pedestrian case. I was the pedestrian. Marc was very straightforward from the beginning and laid out the pros and cons of my case but thought I had good grounds in recovering all insurance monies due me. Marc was very successful and my case was finalized almost one year to the date. Thanks Marc.

I highly recommend Cameron Compton. She was our attorney for our adoption finalization and she is an expert at what she does. Ms. Compton kept our adoption moving quickly, paid attention to every detail, and made the process feel easy and as stress free as possible for us. She is thorough and provides you with all the information to understand your case and what to expect. It was clear that Ms. Compton cared about our case and us and she did a wonderful job. I would use her services again in a heartbeat.

Cameron Compton is very impressive. She goes above and beyond, pays attention to the smallest details and is an expert at what she does. I feel grateful I was referred to her and highly recommend her to anyone who wants an amazing attorney..  You can feel confident she will get things done for you.

Thank you for being so good at what you do Cameron Compton.  You have one very impressed and grateful client in me.

Cameron helped us with the adoption of our grandchild. She did a really good job. She even made sure we got our child's dividend in the past and for the future. Even after the adoption was over I needed her assistance for a few things and she did so free of charge. I think she genuinely cares and it's more than just a job to her. We had a really good experience with her.
Cameron Compton is AMAZING!  She puts in the time and effort for her clients, even outside the office.  I don't know what I would have done without her.   She has definitely been my saving grace!

Ms. Compton is a top-notch attorney.  She is very forthright with information and works diligently for her clients.  My daughter passed away due to a tragic accident; she was a single mother at the time of her death.  The biological father wasn’t in the picture at the time of her death and had been absent most of this child’s life.  Ms. Compton went above and beyond to assists us in securing guardianship of our grandson.  We had many legal issues and hurdles to overcome but with her expertise and broad knowledge of family law our grandson was placed with us.  Without hesitation, I highly recommend her services to anyone.  I am grateful that good friend recommended her to us.

My Long Term Disability was Denied and the Insurance Company only given me 6 months to file an Appeal . I was so depressed aside that I lose my job . I’m experiencing Pain and Muscle Spasm recovering my Cervical Spine Fusion . A week before the Deadline of my Appeal . I saw an Ad on Facebook BOREALIS BENEFIT LAW INC . The Lawyer is ATTORNEY HANS HUGGLER .He was Incredible. He was Always available to answer my questions and explained every step of my Appeal clearly . He was dedicated to his work and very Professional. Handled all the complex paper work. Requested all the last 2 years of my medical records and fiercely advocated for my rights. Thanks to his expertise and determination my claim was APPROVED. I can’t imagine doing it without Atty Hans HUGGLER . I highly recommend him to anyone facing Long Term Disability Denial .

Hans has been wonderful to work with for disability benefits. He is knowledgeable, helpful, and responsive. I was denied benefits by a private company and Hans was able to help me successfully appeal the denial. I highly recommend Borealis Benefits Law if you need assistance with disability benefits.
Attorney Huggler with Borealis Law is excellent. 5 stars! Can't say enough good

A couple of years ago, I contracted the services of Mr. Huggler and Borealis Benefits Law to help me with a FERS medical retirement appeal. Mr. Huggler really helped me! The advice and the direction given to me was key. Their services and advice took the stress and uncertainty away.

The response, advocacy, and documentation prepared by Borealis Benefits Law successfully completed the appeal process and got me my medical retirement that I am owed. I am truly grateful for the help they have provided me!

Rip off. $300 for a phone consultation I cant even afford, let alone $1000 an hour services. Wasted my time and took $300 charge, just for useless advices that I already got from a FREE consultation. I tried to hire a lawyer and assumed I paid $300 for services to help file, not for advices only!
reviews.ownerResponse:
We are disappointed to hear that your experience did not meet your expectations, particularly regarding what the consultation would cover.

We aim to be transparent about our billing from the outset. Our general practice is for all individuals to complete and sign a consultation intake sheet that clarifies the consultation is $300 and is for one (1) hour prior to the consultation being scheduled or payment being collected.

We also wish to clarify our private (non-union or legal program affiliation) hourly billing rate at this time is $375 per hour for partners and $325 per hour for associate attorneys, not $1,000 per hour as stated in the review. We understand legal matters are a significant investment that can be full of unpleasant surprises, and we strive for our billing practices to never be one of those surprises.

We previously offered to resolve your dissatisfaction, and that offer is still open. We welcome you to contact our office directly if you want to discuss this further.

Thank you for your feedback. We will consider it as we continue to improve our intake process to better set expectations for prospective clients.

reviews.text:
We recently worked with Brogan at Artio Law to get our will done, and he made the entire process completely painless. What could’ve been a stressful and confusing experience was actually smooth and even enjoyable, thanks to him.

Brogan was incredibly informative throughout, taking the time to explain all the legal nuances and terminology in a way that made sense—without ever making us feel overwhelmed or out of our depth. He has this great, approachable energy that immediately puts you at ease.

He’s definitely not your typical stuffy, uptight lawyer. Even though wills and estate planning can be a pretty dry topic, Brogan managed to make the process engaging and comfortable from start to finish. We felt well-informed, confident in our decisions, and genuinely cared for. Highly recommend!
Five stars

My name is Tina. Brogan is the most amazingly talented lawyer. We were thrown into a PROBATE/ CIVIL case at the same time. That case should be on the books. Started in 2009-2024. Neither one of us being present till around 2021. I credit brogan for his courage to take this on. He is and amazingly talented lawyer. He should have been a counselor( oops sorry Brogan) no he is where he should be. I should have said he held me together with my emotional responses and my outbursts. When he even had to deliver news that may not have been the best. Brogan always came in to the call always with a smile. If you are looking for a professional talented lawyer he is it. If I could give you advise as a previous client. Always give Brogan your trust and let him make decisions you don’t want to make. It always pays off. We had many laughs and laughed at ourselves. You see I have never met Brogan. Because I am out of state. But I would trust he with anything that I gave him. It’s because of Brogan that after 15years in court, closed. He was determined for me, to help. He always stayed professional and always told me when I was wrong. I valued that. Shhhhhh don’t tell Brogan I said that. But Brogan always gave me dignity. He never let me down. He held me up. Brogan is a storm to be recognized. He will defend you even if he feels you are a mess. He never doubted me. But Brogan never left my side. Even when we had to face Mediation in the end. I had lost my son to cancer a few days before.
Thank you Brogan for being there for me that day. Bryan too. I
Was a mess that day. Like clock work and fine wine. You made me
Smile and outright laugh after a family tragedy. Thank you!!!❤️ remember this Brogan “ try and remember what Justice Fabe said to you that day. Because that’s the essence of the lawyer you are! And my friend’ I am Truly a FAN. Of you and your sidekick Bryan.
Thank you on behalf of all the parties to this case in ending this case. In a manner we are proud.
More advise to the people looking for lawyer. “ hire him and watch him
In action.

TD.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Tina,

Your thoughtful and heartfelt review has nearly left me at a loss for words . . . a rarity for us litigators.  

I am humbled by the trust and confidence you placed in me during such a significant and challenging period in your life.  The acknowledgment of my colleague, Bryan, and myself is genuinely appreciated, and we are pleased to have contributed to ending the protracted litigation, a milestone that will remain as one of my most cherished memories in my legal career.  

Should you find yourself in Anchorage in the future, you have a standing invitation to join our firm for lunch.  It would be a pleasure for both Bryan and me to meet you in person to reminisce on our shared experience and to shoot the breeze on our mutual passion for traveling.

While I sincerely hope you never find yourself in need of our services again, please know that if you do, we will stand by you with unwavering dedication once more.

I wish you nothing but the best as you embark on the next stellar chapter in life!

reviews.text: Artio Law is an absolute lifesaver for our businesses!  Sarah and Brogan are the best! They've been watching our backs for years, and their expertise in business law has been invaluable. From helping us navigate complex contracts to providing crucial guidance on business planning, they've been there every step of the way.  They're the team I keep on retainer – I know that if I ever need a big gun in my corner, Artio Law will be there to fight for us.  Highly recommend!

I am a small-time personal trainer, and Sarah and Brogan at Artio Law have been instrumental in helping me create my personal training agreement and liability form.
Their guidance has been invaluable in expanding and progressing my business while ensuring it stays protected.
Beyond their top-notch legal assistance, I consider them both my friends.
No matter what type of business you have, Artio Law is the team you want in your corner.
Highly recommended!
Highly professional & skilled. Sara is unbelievably talented, skilled and amazing. Truly a Shining star.

Doctor of Law Sara Bloom is one of the most remarkable and compassionate professionals I’ve ever met in the field of law. Sara communicated with me consistently (always available for a ph call &/or Text) &  defended me flawlessly.

Sara was deeply and genuinely committed to uncovering the truth in my case and ensuring justice was served against the odds. Everything went like a chain reaction effect with her dedication.

I found peace, stability, and the outcome I had hoped for.

In this life and the next I would hire her again and again. Worth every cent.

Thank you Sara, In our 1st phone Call I knew you were going to be (With all the respect you deserve) the brightest star guiding us in through that journey.

Strength, Courage, Protector & Guide. 10/10.

P.S. I may not need her again, but just in case I am Sara Bloom’s client & she’s the attorney representing me.

Forever Grateful,
- MDM.
Sara was attentive and thorough in her handling of my employment matter.  She was always quick to respond to phone calls, questions, and texts.  Very knowledgeable in this field.

I have worked with Sara on several cases, and I am consistently impressed by her legal expertise. She is an excellent trial attorney and a great writer. Her dedication to her clients is evident in everything she does. Sara is extremely hardworking, often working late at night. She does whatever she can to win for her clients.  She genuinely cares about her clients and does her best to support them, tailoring her approach to their individual circumstances.  It was a pleasure trying and winning cases with her in court, as it is evident that she has years of experience before judges and juries.

Beginning in 2020 and culminating in 2025, Sara has been by my side through all the ups and downs of battling the Federal Government. With over 1,500 pages of investigative work (paid for by the Federal government) plus emails, affidavits, etc., Sara poured through these documents to solidify our case against the FAA. We won the initial decision, the FAA appealed, We won the Appeals court. The FAA still refused to comply. Sara filed additional paperwork. In the end we finally succeeded in getting my job back, all back pay plus benefits, and compensation.
Throughout, Sara was uncompromising. When the FAA offered a ridiculously low sum to settle the case Sara immediately told them we would see them in court. I love the tenacity and grit!
I'm glad I reached out to Sara for legal services. She was great, took less than 4 weeks to get a settlement, with my legal issues. I would definately call her again if needed.

I had a great experience working with Sara on a workplace legal matter involving my former employer. From the very beginning, she was incredibly responsive, kind, and informative. She took the time to truly listen to my situation and provided clear, realistic options at every step. I felt fully represented and supported throughout the process. Even after the case was resolved, she followed up immediately on related items that came up—something I really appreciated. I would absolutely recommend Sara to anyone needing legal help.

I was really trying hard to like my experience but I just don’t feel like I got the help, understanding, communication I was looking for, for the money I put in. it also doesn’t look good when the lawyer writes the wrong profession on the letter to your employer :(

I had the pleasure of working with Sara Bloom on my case, and I cannot recommend her highly enough. From the very beginning, her communication was outstanding. She was always available to talk and took the time to explain every detail to me, which made a huge difference in my understanding of the legal process.

I've never experienced such attentive service in a legal environment before. Sara truly walked me through the complexities of the law with patience and clarity. Everything was settled quickly and efficiently, but what stood out the most was her compassion throughout the process.

If you're looking for someone who not only understands the business but also makes you feel comfortable during what can be a stressful time, Sara is the person to go to. I wholeheartedly recommend her services to anyone in need!
Sara was very professional in the courtroom and out, answered all questions thoroughly, and gave solid advice. I really appreciated her quick response to emails and/or texts, it was very reassuring.

Sara was prompt, professional, extremely knowledgeable and compassionate towards the situation. I was extremely please with her continued level of commitment and communication when my employer attempted to take a hard line was amazing. I would recommend Sara to anyone who has or feels the have been wronged by their employer. She will help make it right. Also, what I respected was, she was honest about the position and reality of what was possible not many attorneys are that ethical.

Paid $300 for a 20 minute phone call where she said she couldn't help me.  Easiest $300 she ever made.

I strongly recommend that you confirm exactly what it is you are paying for before you give her your credit card information.

Sara was incredibly helpful in negotiating an overall better severance package on my behalf. I called her office and left a message first thing on a Monday morning. Sara got in contact with me immediately, listened to my concerns, and got started fighting for me right away. I definitely recommend her.
Sara is amazing.  Response time is excellent and her knowledge is very apparent when speaking. I like her direct approach and no nonsense approach of what can and can not be done.  Highly recommend

My experience with Sara was excellent. She is professional, timely, and very direct. I appreciate the work she put in for me and the thoughtful advice she gave me throughout my time spent with her. Would not hesitate to recommend her!

Sara is a dynamic, caring and tenacious attorney.  for almost five years, she has brought her decades of big city law experience related to accidents and personal injury to Anchorage where she also handles employment law.  Her prices are super reasonable for her prowess in the courtroom!  Seriously, the best in town without a big ego which many of her colleagues exude!
Probably the best there is. Saved me time and money. Highly recommend!!

reviews.text: Christy Lee and her staff helped me sort out an IRS problem involving  a screwed up trust put together by some lawyer who didn't know what they were doing; and caused IRS audit of the estate.  When the IRS sent me the letter, I didn't know what to do, I had family hounding me for the money in the trust and I was scared I was going to get stuck with a huge tax bill. I asked Christy to open all the IRS letters and get the crazy family to back off - what a relief, she saved me soo much grief. She knew how to handle the IRS questions and saved me having to talk to the IRS.  By the time it was all done, Christy saved me years of stress and got the crazy & greedy family members out of my life; the money she saved me more than covered the fees. Thank you Christy! 5 stars

reviews.text: Mr Parvin is very caring, and very good at his job.
The best lawyer in the state
Greg is very persistant, smart, and interactive. He is there for you through and through. Thee best person I can recommend for you.
Greg is extremely professional and knows the law! Highly recommended! Great staff as well.
Very professional and outstanding work

Gregory Parvin and his staff are wonderful caring people who really do look out for their clients best interests. Very professional and friendly. I would highly recommend the Law Office of Gregory Parvin

Gregory Parvin is a wonderful caring man who really does have people's best interests in mind.
my husband and I were passengers in a car accident that turned our world upside down. We both lost our jobs and had a baby on the way. Meanwhile the hospital tried to come after us because we were unable to immediately pay the medical bills. We went to Gregory Parvin's law office, told him our story, showed him our bills and he went to work instantly. It took him no more than 2 months to get our bills taken care of, all legal fees were taken care of and he got us a settlement that is now helping us take care of our new born son. I would highly recommend this Law Office to anyone and everyone. He is honest and fast working. We love the office ladies too. He fixed our lives and there is no way to truly thank him  for that. GO SEE GREG!!!

Mr. Houston represented me through a portion of my divorce.  Mr. Houston’s representation was adequate initially, however, the law is not his passion in life and, from my experience, he does not possess the character, professionalism, resources or basic decency to do it well.  If your divorce matter is an easy one (what divorce is?) and requiring minimal effort, then he could probably get you through it.  If it is not, you should find a different resource.

I mediated my settlement and, with some exceptions, had little interest in fighting much in the court.  Mr. Houston’s responsiveness in this period was lacking as well (it’s just him at his office) and while he knows enough of the law, he just doesn’t really care.  In fairness, he did extend enough effort to get me through most of my divorce, but his attention and responsiveness was lacking during our entire time working together.  I addressed this issue (and he acknowledged it with me) repeatedly.  If you are new to divorce, you will quickly learn that there are many personal decisions that are highly impactful and long lasting that you will work through during the process which is largely unfamiliar with unknown outcomes.  Pretty stressful.  Having good legal guidance and support during this time is almost as important as the representation you might receive from your attorney.  You are not going to get this from Mr. Houston.

One issue that was not resolved in our mediation was child support.  This was reserved for a hearing post settlement.  Upon request to Mr. Houston to petition the court for this hearing, he did so.  Subsequently, however, Mr. Houston abandoned his representation, failing to respond to opposing council filings along with innumerable phone calls and emails from myself as I watched this unfold.  It didn’t take too long for the opposing council to realize Mr. Houston’s lack of action and the end result of his abandonment were uncontested judgments against myself.  I then ended up having to find new council after Mr. Houston’s abandonment which cost me a significant amount of money just to get them up to speed, have past orders reversed/paused, and to have the final hearing required to finally resolve my divorce.  Mr. Houston’s actions were so far beyond unprofessional.  They represent a total moral failure.

I’d never gone through a divorce before or been close with anyone who had, so the entire process was new to me.  It’s emotional, impactful, subjective and destructive enough just as it is.  I had no idea just how detrimental it can be to you to have such poor representation.  Mr. Houston does have a good personality about him and is someone that you’d probably enjoy having a beer with, but that’s not what you are paying him for.  In retrospect what struck me most is that he frequently discussed his own feelings about the law and his desire to shift from this to personal counseling.  I liked that at the time, but seeing his actions of abandonment gave me a deeper perspective of his limited character and internal conflicts.  He’s not a good lawyer and the lack of substance shown in his actions demonstrates that he wouldn’t be any good as a personal councilor either with such limited principals, ethical failures, and limited concern for those that might mistakenly trust in his support.  For someone who expresses professional interest in providing others with emotional support, Mr. Houston doesn’t seem to possess the traits needed for this occupation either.

You really don’t want to add another layer of stress to your situation (however constructive or un-constructive it may be) by having such poor representation and responsiveness from your council.  If you are just starting a divorce, good luck.  There is nothing here that you’ll find enjoyable, but life will certainly be better for you on the back side.

For your own benefit in getting though this as best you can, I could not stress highly enough that you consider other alternatives for representation.

David from Houston and Houston is a very nice guy and personable! That's what drew me to him in the first place when I was looking for a lawyer to help me with my divorce. My husband and I had found out that I was diagnosed with Stage 4 cancer and didn't want to extend the divorce any longer and go to trial. We wanted to figure out a settlement agreement instead. I, unfortunately, did not have a great experience with David and decided to switch to a different law firm a month before my trial date. In the beginning, he was great. David answered my questions, and scheduled meetings with me to make sure I understood the divorce process. However, over time the communication began to lack.  There were moments in which I had not heard from him for weeks to months at a time even though I was reaching out via email and phone. I began to feel as if David did not have my best interest in mind and although I had mentioned on multiple occasions I wanted to have a divorce settlement rather than going to trial it felt as if David wanted to go to trial instead. He would delay his responses, then be out of town for multiple weeks, then ignore my request for settlement discussion and just push for trial. Which is not what I wanted. This began to frustrate me as one could imagine. I mentioned my frustration to David and let him know if things did not change then I would seek representation elsewhere. Unfortunately, nothing changed and I decided to go with a different law firm in town that I felt had my best interest in mind. I would not recommend him as a lawyer.
David Houston is an amazing lawyer and a great person. He walked me through a very stressful divorce and kept me calm and level headed all throughout. I will always be grateful.
The first Lawyer i have ever liked.

David Houston recently represented me in a divorce.  He was meticulous in researching the complicated dissection of our lives.  Mr. Houston is strong in his legal knowledge as well as a compassionate person.  I trust his advise and recommendations.

Kneely was our attorney while we were going through a contested adoption. He was absolutely amazing and left no stone unturned. Very thorough and knowledgeable beyond measure. I would absolutely use him again; should we need to.

I tried contacting them to set up a consultation and gave brief overview of my situation. I received an email confirming they received my request and would be in contact. Waited and then followed up by calling them and left a voicemail requesting a call back. A week later and I still never heard back from them.
The services of this office were outstanding and prompt.  It was easy to work with the office.
No stars or negative, he won a case but failed to follow through with protecting our family like he was supposed to
They took the time to listen and understand my case.

Henderson Law has a great knowledge of the "personal injury/medical malpractice" field of law. They are very well prepared in all phases of litigation.  They have a very friendly, experienced and knowledgeable support team, including their outside "experts." I most certainly would use them again and would recommend Henderson Law to any friend in need of a legal advocate to support them in a personal injury/malpractice dispute.
Very honest folks

David Henderson and his staff are caring and attentive to detail.  David himself has an intense burning intellect. He is absolutely insightful and brilliant. His training and experience shows when it comes down to the brass tacks of a legal case, as it did with mine. When things went wrong, I was glad to have him and his staff as my advocates.

If you have a personal injury legal case and you hire David Henderson as your lawyer, you will feel the same. Glad that you have David as your fierce warrior shielding you from much of the flak that flies out after an accident.

David is caring, and very giving of his time. So were his staff members (a special shout out to Marc and Teresea). Just a wonderful crew all around.

He got me a good settlement during difficult times (Covid). We settled for mediation because of this, but David also has gone to Trial School, and has a reputation for being a worthy opponent in court. I am sure he would have done well for me there as well.

I will never second guess my choice, he did very well by me and my family. I give thanks to him and his staff for seeing us through this incredibly painful time.

Called their office to ask about getting representation.  The first person I spoke with didn’t answer when I requested to know his first name instead he just moved onto his next question. As if I was not worthy of an answer from him. After a couple more questions I was asked who or what I thought I should be going after with my suite. I was not sure as this is why I had called them. He barrels into more questions and about half way into my answer he starts basically harassing me about the answer. At this point I am sultan this is not the type of law firm I want to as it me. I hang up hoping he gets the opportunity to witness the golden rule in action. You see I figured that he was just treating me the way he liked to be treated.  Hopping on a more productive day I’m moving on to the next lawyer’s firm hopefully I get treated respectfully this time.
reviews.ownerResponse: We are sorry to hear about your experience. Our well-meaning staff does ask multiple questions in regards to a potential case so we can better understand how to serve you. The law can be a very complex matter and having all the details within a case can make the difference with successful representation. We apologize if this came across as intrusive and will be using this opportunity to improve our services, thank you.

reviews.text: I approached David Henderson about a very tough legal situation. He was extremely respondent, kind and professional.  He made every effort to keep in communication with me and address my concerns.  I was extremely impressed with his dedication to my case.  He is a lawyer that you can trust and put your faith in.  He fought for me in court and made every effort to succeed and get me the money I deserved. I have had lawyers in the past, but nobody that fought for me like David Henderson.  I am very appreciative! Thank you David.

I am thankful to have been a client of Mr. David Henderson. He is a professional, respectful and brilliant man. I would not have been able to navigate the legal sector without Mr. Henderson and his staff. They are a wonderful group. I am grateful for their help, advice and the positive conclusion. I would highly advise anyone who is in need of legal help to contact Mr. Henderson.

Mr Henderson is an amazing professional. During the handling of our case we felt that his honesty and attention of detail helped us come to a  settlement that ensures the well being of our family long term. However we also believe the we were well prepared to present our in case in trial with the expectation that our claim was going to be successful.  At the same we believe we received the financial justice my family was pursuing to give us a piece of mind going forward. Thank you Mr. Henderson

Me and my wife went into their office for legal advice and help (keep in mind we never had to deal with attorneys or lawyers before so we were already uncomfortable) we walked in and someone asked what we needed, we gave them a brief story and he sent us to the side room and he went and talked with his partner we heard him say “what am I supposed to do about it” and he laughed.. This made us so embarrassed and uncomfortable, he came in not really caring what we had to say until he found out i was in the military and then he seemed a little more interested.. 0/10 do not recommend in going to these people especially if you’re military ! Very unprofessional and absolutely mortified that he was this rude..
reviews.ownerResponse: We are sorry to hear about your experience. We pride ourselves on our excellent service to clients and take this feedback seriously. I certainly was not laughing at your condition and I am deeply sorry that you thought that was the case. Unfortunately, we could not take your case due to the facts of the case.

reviews.text: David Henderson is an extremely competent and experienced attorney.  He was particularly adept at finding the right experts to work on our case which proved crucial to a favorable outcome.  More importantly, David got us the answers our family needed to move forward with the healing process.   I would very strongly recommend him to anybody seeking legal assistance.

David is the perfect solution to tough problems. He is a great listener and will provide you with a wide range of options. He will go to bat for you and have your back. I know this because he did that for me.

Mr. Henderson is a brilliant lawyer.  He represented me in a bad automobile accident.  He was always helpful and answered all my questions.  We won the case.   The result far exceeded my expecations.  I highly recommend his law firm.

David Henderson is an honest and very straight forward lawyer he is a hard working attorney who will fight for you, I know because  he represented me and the outcome was way beyond my expectations. I'm very proud to say he is not only my attorney but my friend. Thank you David !
Because
This man was a BLESSING AND I would point EVERYONE I LOVE TO HIS BUSINESS  just for the Genuine person he is!!!
Pay him and he’ll Put in the good work for you.

I’d like to add to this do not use this attorney he abandoned me and never sent in one piece of evidence not even a note from him my divorce was fininshed my X told me 55 days later to long to Appel and I lost everything as he did not purse nothing I asked of him with Covid all was by phone so I had no idea this had happened I’m told sue him great case legal malpractice but more money and find a Attorney to do it in AK just find anyone but him research reviews be smart
No better than a public defender..

Fantastic attorney! A true warrior for justice and a seasoned veteran of the legal system. Danee handled my case with the utmost professionalism, compassion and attention to detail. Highly recommended! This wonderful lady should be a Judge!

Couldn't be bothered to deal with me when she heard "landlord", thought it was a typical eviction case maybe, I do not know, all I do know, is, Lynn called and left a, very uncomfortable sounding, refusal of consultation,  saying "She doesn't think this is anything she could help you with, sooo..uh,..if you.." I hung up & deleted the message.
WHAT KIND OF QUALITY ATTORNEY REFUSES TO DO ANY DUE DILIGENCE TO ASK ANY QUESTIONS TO FIND OUT?! ISNT THAT YOUR JOB, LADY?!
Honestly, if she thinks she's too refined and of such high quality & training WHEN THEY ADVERTISE CONTACT FOR CONSULT (what brought us here today) AND REFUSE THE CONSULT ON A THOUGHT?! A MERE NOTION?! HOW HARD IS SHE GOING TO WORK FOR, LISTEN TO, ANYONE?!
I'm not the one needing defending. I'm the One going go after the One needing the defending, AND HAS THE MONEY TO DO IT.
Every point of my case? She advertises as her "passions" & other typical descriptions they use for themselves.
THIS IS NOT A WOMANS WOMAN!
reviews.ownerResponse: I am sorry you had a negative experience with my office. I do not practice in the area of law that was identified in your voicemail. It is my practice to still have my assistant reach out under such circumstances with a referral to one of my qualified colleagues, which is what occurred. I am receptive to your feedback as to how I could better manage this dynamic in the future. I wish you the best of luck and encourage you to contact the individuals I identified. Thank you and take care.

reviews.text: Danée represented me in a family law matter. She was thorough, tactful and honest. I am very pleased with the level of care she gave my case and I would hire her in the future. I go ig hot recommend an attorney who cares about her clients as well as the many facets of the justice system.

I called POWER &POWER!!! I spoke with Michelle Power. she was sympathetic, kind , caring. She understood that the statute of limitations was coming up with in days. she excepted my case on that phone call. (she told me ,she did not feel it was a loosing case, of course, nothing is guaranteed.)that put my mind at easy. I met Whitney Power the day of the mediation. I shall say their last name POWER fits them to the letter!! These ladies,  well in my day we would say they are some Bad ass Boss Lawyers!:)! Now, in 2025, I would describe them as FIERCE, STRONG, BOLD, RESPECTFUL,UNFLINCHING, POWERFUL BOSS LADY LAWYERS! WHO YOU WANT ON YOUR TEAM, REPRESENTING YOU! They are fully prepared , they do their homework & they fight hard!  When you go to court or mediation they make sure you feel fully prepared, all your questions are answered & you feel comfortable. I can not express how happy I am:) , If you are in need of an attorney these ladies will fight for you until you are happy! They genuinely care about there clients. I truly recommend both of them with all of my heart.  I can not say enough good things about both of them.  Thank you so much from the bottom of my heart. The POWER ladies change peoples lives!

I can’t say enough positive things about my attorney, Whitney Power. She is absolutely amazing and truly went above and beyond for me and my family. I was involved in two car accidents that were not my fault—both incredibly stressful situations, especially because my infant child was also in the car with me during one of them.

Throughout the entire process, Whitney showed unwavering dedication, compassion, and strength. She fought hard for us, made sure we were taken care of medically, and ensured our voices were heard. She kept me informed every step of the way and never made me feel like just another case.

Thanks to her hard work and determination, all of our medical bills were covered, and she secured a settlement that gave us real peace of mind. I’ll forever be grateful to her for not only her legal expertise but also for her empathy and the way she genuinely cared about our well-being.

If you’re looking for someone who will truly fight for you and your family, look no further than Whitney Power. She is truly a powerhouse and a blessing.

My original question when calling into this law firm was, “Do you do PERSONAL INJURY CASES”? 
“Whitney” is who answered in her “SWEET” voice says “Yes, we do PERSONAL INJURY CASES, that’s what we specialize in”.
Then I started explaining my case, two sentences in, she was so QUICK to cut me off and STOP ME DEAD SENTENCE TO TELL ME THEY “DO NOT DO EMPLOYMENT CASES”.

Yet, she hadn’t even heard the rest of what I was going to say.! SMH 🤦‍♀️ 

Then after cutting me off she was reluctant to start spewing out of her now sour toned voice all the types of cases they DID DO! 

Airplane Crashes, Car Accidents, and so on..

I said okay well mine was”Carbon Monoxide Poisoning”. I told her thank you for her time and hung up as QUICK AS SHE CUT ME OFF.
So, My QUESTION IS.
“I guess that’s not considered a personal injury”!? 
And that I find rather odd because I have three other attorneys offices I’ve called that say, this is in fact a PERSONAL INJURY CLAIM.

But then again, THEY LISTENED TO THEIR PROSPECTIVE CLIENT BEFORE BEING SO QUICK TO HANG UP INSTEAD OF LISTENING.

I’m SO SORRY WHITNEY, that Co2 Poisoning has made me SCATTERBRAINED A BIT,(not my choice).
But you should learn that, “PATIENCE IS A VIRTUE”. And that people who suffer personal injuries have different levels of communication because they have SUFFERED PERSONAL INJURY EVEN THROUGH EMPLOYMENT.

I WOULD NOT RECOMMEND you to anyone, that wants to “BE HEARD. 

That is HONESTLY THE MOST RUDE 2 MINUTE PHONE CALL I’VE EVER HAD IN MY LIFE.

I don’t even know where to begin!  I was involved in an accident back on 11/11/2021.  I originally hired a different law firm, but after about a year and a few months I decided to part ways with them. After thinking my case was all but dead, I gave power & power a call.  I spoke to Whitney, laid out all the details of the case, informed her the previous lawyers weren’t able to accomplish much, yet they were still more than happy to take on the case.
A few months later…. Without even having to go to trial, I had not one, but two settlement checks combining for more than I had even hoped for. I have nothing but amazing things to say about Whitney and Power & Power. Highly recommend to ANYONE needing to hire a personal injury attorney.

Whitney did an excellent job working on the injury case I was involved in. She was very responsive and explained everything in a manner I could understand. She was also very honest about the odds of a favorable outcome. In the end she did get the maximum settlement possible, but I would recommend her even if the outcome was different.

Words cannot express the Thanks I owe to Power and Power Law, in particular Whitney Power.
I tried to fight the responsible parties insurance company (auto accident) for many months by myself and was never able to make any significant headway. Upon hiring Whitney the insurance company came alive with responsiveness and seemed much more willing to cooperate in reasonable terms. Whitney ensured all of my medical bills were paid for and I was taken care of. Power and Power Law seemed to break the mold or the pre conceived notion I had about attorneys (mostly negative) Whitney's Integrity, professionalism, and moral compas are top notch, superlative in the truest sense of the word.
To those who would say attorneys are to expensive I would offer this. At least for Whitney in my experience she is worth and earned every cent. On behalf of my family and myself I would like to say thank you to the staff at Power and Power Law, Thank you to Michelle Power and Thank you beyond words to Whitney Power. You guys truly helped me prevail in one of my darkest and most difficult hours.

Sincerely
Garret Stewart & Family
Whitney & Michele helped my family get through one of the most hard and traumatic experiences of our life. Only trustworthy attorneys in the State of Alaska. Thank you!

Michelle & Whitney are wonderful. Any time i had any questions or concerns they would
always return my calls or messages right away. They were very compassionate, and made me feel that they were genuinely concerned for my well being. Always very pleasant and a pleasure to communicate with. They kept me constantly updated and in the loop to any and all things that had to do with my case. I would definitely recommend them to anyone looking for great lawyers who will work hard to get you what you deserve. Wonderful people who did an amazing job. Thanks again for all your hard work!!!!

My family enjoyed the peace of mind and the quality of good work with this law firm. If you need help Power attorneys will get you the help you deserve. Thank you so much from the bottom of our hearts!
Greatest. They've been a huge help to our family...idk what we'd do without them. 💙

Michelle Power helped my family in our darkest hour.

You can't say enough about somebody like that. It goes beyond money or words. Michelle is talented, smart, and she has a heart where most attorneys do not.

Nobody wants to call a plaintiff's attorney for a reason like mine. But if I ever have to call again, I will only call Michelle.

Finding a very good attorney that you can trust and efficiently work with your case can be very stressful. But hiring and obtaining legal services from Attorney Michele Power and staff was the best decision we made. From the free initial consultation until our case closed, Attorney Power and staff demonstrated professionalism, commitment, and a great work ethic. Attorney Power is highly knowledgeable, fair, and effective. She thoroughly explained to us the legal process and the possible outcome of our case, and kept us informed which made every step of the way less stressful. They are also prompt in answering questions via phone or email. We highly recommend Attorney Power and staff for any of your personal injury case.

We can't say enough good things about Michele Power. She took our medical malpractice case when no one else in Alaska could handle it.  Ms. Power exemplified due diligence, legal expertise, and negotiation abilities every step of the way.  She meticulously investigated the circumstances surrounding my husband's near-death and permanent brain damage due to medical incompetence. She wasn't intimidated by the medical machine and its big money lawyers. Her approach in our case was consistently professional and legally sound. She didn't stop until the case was done. Our family will forever appreciate her hard work and determination on our behalf.
Great service and people. Won my first lawsuit with them! Now have them for my current lawsuit!
reviews.ownerResponse: JD, we are fortunate to work with people like you!

reviews.text: The insanest place on earth. How the hell you going to ask for all this information about my crash then in the end tell me you can’t take my case because I live in Alaska?! What in the world! I told you I’m from Alaska in the first place yet you made me disclose all this damn information. Waste of my breath!!!!!!!!!!!
Very plrasant
VERY VERY GOOD BILINDA IS GREAT THANK YOU

i am amazed..   the agent mixed perfectly an offer of professionalism and a personal touch of grief and concern to leave me knowing that if there is help out there for my case, he will find it for me.
SHE WASN'T ATTENTIVE AND ACTED LIKE SHE WAS IN A HURRY WHEN I AM DISTRAUGHT AND WAS CRYING
Empathetic and concerned about the details. Appreciated his help.
Great
Overall satisfied and pleased

Currently holds the record for 2nd place of largest win in the state of Alaska for a medical malpractice case. All major attorney know and respect George and he's a Vietnam vet as well. He's served many hard working Alaskans over decades, these 2 one star reviews belong in the Alaska land fill. If they don't get the results wanted then they abuse the ratings.

Left us hanging after two years of workin on a seemingly cut and dried just two weeks before our court date with nowhere to turn for help. Providence Hospital and surgeon Aaron Brown had way too many attorneys. Our guess is Kapolchok took a payoff. Many of the attorneys were his friends.

George has helped me out legally many times in my life. His law firm has always been professional and very friendly. I always feel very calm about whatever legal issues I am dealing with George and his team by my side. I highly recommend anyone who needs legal counsel to seek out Kapolchok Law Office immediately.
I was in an accident several years ago and these guys came thru for me big time! 🙌🏼
Thanks...

Isaac and Summer are a great team.  Isaac has helped me to finally construct and fund my Non revocable Living Trust.  He made what I anticipated to be very complicated and time consuming task into a very smooth and productive experience.  I would highly recommend their services to anyone with similar needs.

We felt blessed to find Isaac and his practice on Google. His no nonsense, down to earth approach to our estate planning was a breath of fresh air. He’s great at asking all the right questions and finding out your goals and then drafting up a plan from there. He was quick to reach out if he ever needed clarification on something or if he needed more info from us. He was also very flexible in working with our schedules and even did one of our initial meetings via zoom so we didn’t have to make a trip out. I love that it’s a family practice and his family is always around the office! We would recommend Isaac to anyone looking for a lawyer and will continue to seek
His advice for any future legal matters we encounter.

Midnight Sun Law Group helped me with my Trust, Will and Medical advances directive!!
Very professional, punctual and FUN!!
Highly recommend them!!!! Great Team!!
Thank you for your work!!
We will be working together till the day comes!!
✌🏻🧡🪵🛩️🎼🌞🎶
I trust these attorneys more than anyone.

Outstanding Legal Team with Heart and Integrity.

I cannot recommend this law firm highly enough. From the moment I first connected with Summer and Isaac, it was clear that this husband-and-wife team brings not only deep legal knowledge, but also a genuine care for the people and communities they serve.

Whether you're navigating a complex legal issue or just need solid advice, you'll be hard-pressed to find a more trustworthy or wholesome team..

Based in Eagle River and serving those throughout Alaska, they've created something truly special - a firm rooted in integrity, professionalism, and a real desire to help.  They're both incredibly sharp, but what stood out to me most was how approachable, honest, and compassionate they are. You don't feel like "just another client" — you feel heard, respected, and in capable hands.

It's rare to see this kind of dedication and authenticity in any field — especially law.
If you're looking for a law firm that knows the law, values its clients, and is deeply committed to serving the Eagle River and Anchorage communities, look no further. This is the power couple you want in your corner.
Unethical. Incompetent paralegal. Avoid.
The best lawyer in Alaska thanks

I want to thank Kortney shaw, for her incredible hard work and dedication to my crimal and custody case. I highly recommend Daryl Jones for your attorney, he has an incredible staff with him. They were all amazing!

STAY AWAY!!! They won’t answer calls or return them for days they will pick the easiest path to collect the check even if it means misleading the client. They helped me during my divorce and after we finalized everything they told me nothing we put in writing was enforceable and I was going to have a hard time with changing anything. I asked for copies of all documents  and have yet to receive anything. I would advise caution especially when working with Ashley she is rude and unprofessional.
One of the worst decisions in my life was hiring him, it was almost worse then my criminal case itself. Save your money and get a public defender then retaining him!

My two dogs were seized by APD on August 22, 2021. August 25, 2021 hired Darrly Jones to help get my 2 dogs out of incarceration at Anchorage Animal Control. Paid Darrly 3000.00 he stated he would get my dogs out of jail.  The dogs did nothing to warrent being held on cold concrete, eating plain dog food, no walks, no pets. My house dogs are being tortured and you and your staff have done very little to help.  My dogs have been jailed for 5 months.  You and your staff are the worse and l pray nothing but I'll will towardd you and you street people staff.  You are a joke as an attorney.

Darryl himself seems like a competent attorney, and was helpful during the settlement conference of my divorce. Unfortunately, his billing “department” made numerous costly errors and the paralegal that works for him is not detail-oriented, refuses to take responsibility for her errors, and has the general demeanor of an impetuous teenage girl rather than a professional. Darryl routinely canceled appointments with me only minutes before the scheduled time, and often failed to reschedule, making it my responsibility to do so.
In all, I think I could have had better value elsewhere. His office staff are liabilities and do not listen. His paralegal, in particular, is a twit.
Darryl is extremely reliable and has never left me wondering or guessing about what's going on.  He also appears to be highly respected & well known in the legal system of Anchorage.

Mr. Weidner is Quick and effective, stood by my side. I hired him for a short period of time specific to a role & he bought justice to me. Even available on Sundays for his clients. Communicate constantly & immediately available.

Sharp minded, genuinely concerned for his clients, Great and sincere human being. I really respect his discipline.

P.S. Mr. Phil I wish you can write a book teaching the younger people about life, strategy wisdom, integrity and family.

Thank you Phil.

- Melvin
Phillip, Lisa and their staff were always available, provided information about my case in a way I understood, and were always acting in my best interest.  I highly recommend them!

They kept on top of getting the proper paperwork to all parties. We were able to come to an agreeable outcome and close my case. Very professional work and I am very happy with the team Weidner Rosano..

I am very happy with the service Phillip Weidner and his team have provided for me. Everything was handled in a timely manner and everyone on his team displayed professional excellence.
Thanks to the hard work and dedication from the team and especially Phillip Weidner for all of the time and energy spent helping those of us affected by the McKinley fire to find some closure in this tragedy, your efforts will not be forgotten and your best wishes will always be in our prayers.

Benjamin Daniels.
Philip was dedicated and invested in securing a positive outcome

My name is Shari Larson.
I was represented by Weidner & Associates, in the McKinley Fire litigation. I was treated with courtesy & the utmost respect by this Office. I do not expect to have need of Legal Services in the future…HOWEVER, if I WERE to have need, I would definitely call on Mr. Weidner & his Office.
Thank You for your compassion in the handling of this matter.
God Bless

Weidner Associates is a”stand by you the entire time” type of law firm while managing to keep you in the loop the entire time. They have an amazing way of taking you in and treating you like family. W&A take each case on like it’s themselves on the line and they take it to heart, they always manage to put in the extra effort and time to properly represent each persons unique case. I not only highly recommend having them represent you, I would take great pride in having them represent myself and or anyone I know in the court of law.

When Phillip took agreed to take me on as a client he took on late nights at the office, Wendy’s drive thru food for dinner just trying to get food in his stomach while pushing further and further into all the details concerning my case. He called around the clock to keep me informed, gave me the best advice and always pointed me in the right direction. I want to thank Phillip from the bottom of my heart and all his right hand men and women who fought for justice…
If you are looking for Alaskas best lawyer & law firm look no further, you truly won’t find anyone better to represent you & or someone you love.

Phillip has been amazing. He's not only a great lawyer but he's a great man. He has never waivered & always willing to go to bat for us. We love Phillip & are so thankful to him & his staff. This man is in it to win it!! Thank you Phillip, we'll forever hold you in our hearts. You were there for us in our darkest hours. Your kindness will never be forgotten.

Attorney Ms. Cristina Weidner is 10 out of 10! Ms. Weidner provided me with the best assistance I could ask for and went above and beyond. I am grateful to have worked with her. You will not be disappointed by retaining her services!

Philip and his team represented me through the arduous litigation process, and fought for me, yielding outcomes that have benefited me decades into the future. His office continues to be supportive, caring, personal, and efficient; thank you for changing my life for the better!

Phillip Weidner is the most principled attorney I have ever hired. I was indicted on marijuana and gun charges in the late nineties and was facing ninety nine years on nebulous conspiracy charges. I paid him a flat fee to defend me. After that he was my personal legal pitbull. He spent seven and a half years fighting every motion he filed, from  AK Superior Court to AK Appellate Court to the AK Supreme Court. After exhausting state courts, every motion was filed through the Ninth circuit and then through the US Supreme Court. This was time consuming and costly to his firm. He never pressured me to take a plea, in fact he assured me that we needed to fight on. Remember, I’d already paid him up front. I dare say most attorneys would have encouraged me to cut a deal but for Phillip it wasn’t about what was best for his firm, it was about what was the best deal he could negotiate for me. The State went from offering me four years in prison, then two, and finally no time, just probation. If I would have declined that offer he would have happily taken my (weak) case to trail. I remember during my Evidentiary hearing the courtroom filled up with lawyers taking personal time to observe his cross examinations. He is a legend in the legal circles of this state. This man got me through a most difficult time in life. I will always be in his debt.

Phillip Paul Weidner, Michael Cohn, Phillip Paul Weidner and Associates, A Professional Corporation, and all the Attorneys and Staff I worked with are incredible fighters for people’s  rights. They fought for nine years for mine when I lost my arm in a trucking accident and they finally won my case in the Alaska Supreme Court in the face of law from 48 states that was against me and then obtained a settlement. They took my case, a case that most lawyers would not take given the law, and throughout they understood my needs and spared no effort in helping me. While there were times that I had given up, they did not.  They are not only persistent, they are very sensitive, understanding, and caring and A Plus Plus Plus lawyer with full knowledge of the law and will find the truth and master the facts and will not quit and are not afraid to fight. The end result was a confidential settlement and I cannot fully express my admiration and respect for them and my gratitude for what they did for me.  Now, me and my girls, will live a very comfortable life thanks to them!  ~John Buckley

I am incredibly pleased with the services provided by Weidner and Associates. We had a complicated DV case, and the team took an active role in getting the case dismissed as was the goal of all parties involved. The team was empathetic and thorough in their handling of our case. If you need a hard-working advocate, you would be well-served to consider this firm.

I am immensely grateful to Phillip Paul Weidner & Associates for their professionalism, time, energy, efforts, and patience on my behalf over all the years of representing me. reviews.text:
*Disclaimer* I had fun with this review to draw attention to a perspective from a long-time client and to make reading reviews less boring. Content is valid, despite the fun with it, and Mr. Henshaw is a phenomenal lawyer and person.*

Alright folks, buckle up for a ride through the legal world with the legend himself, Mr. Henshaw. Now, I've been rolling with this dude for a hot minute, so grab a cup of coffee and settle in 'cause this review's gonna be more detailed than a detective's case file.

So, picture this: I stumbled upon Mr. Henshaw back when he was slinging law at some other joint. Wasn't too keen on that place, what with their prices reaching the stratosphere. But hey, I stuck around 'cause this man is worth his weight in gold. Then one day, bam, he decides to break free and start his own gig. No hesitation, I'm like, "Hey, Henshaw, we're riding with you!"

Back in the day, when he was at the old firm, my fam and I fell head over heels for his dedication, his smarts, and his down-to-earth vibe. None of that sleazy lawyer nonsense with this guy. He's more like your buddy who just happens to know a ton about law. And let me tell ya, he's not afraid to give you a reality check when you need it. Plus, he's got a killer team backing him up, great at keeping the lines of communication open.

Let's talk character, shall we? Mr. Henshaw's the kind of dude who can spot a strong woman from a mile away. He's like a legal Jedi, sensing when you're about to crack under pressure and swooping in to save the day. How? 'Cause he actually cares about his clients, takes the time to get to know 'em. That's rare in this business, my friends.

Now, onto the nitty-gritty. Dude's repped my husband and me in everything from family drama to restraining orders (which we technically lost on paper, but scared the living daylights outta our stalker, so who's the real winner here?). And get this, he's not just about the big cases. He's helped us out with all the little legal hiccups that pop up as you get older.

Payments? Fair. Time? Calculated with precision. And when the world's on fire and you need legal help ASAP, guess who's just a phone call away? That's right, Mr. Henshaw.

I used to think the idea of a "family attorney" was as outdated as a flip phone, but this guy's brought it back in style. So, if you find yourself knee-deep in legal trouble, especially of the family variety, do yourself a favor and give Mr. Henshaw a shout. Trust me, you won't regret it. And hey, if you do, well, you probably need a lawyer more than I do!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you! Glad we could help you!

The phone rang once, and I immediately talked to someone at the Dillon and Findley Law Firm. They listened, they asked questions, and they were concerned about my situation. I was told I would receive a callback. Less than one hour later, I received a return phone call from Attorney Molly Brown.

Molly immediately knew the detailed laws of my case and explained the complexities within the first two minutes of the phone call. Not only did Molly know employment law, she also had sympathy and compassion for the mistreatment I was enduring.

Molly presented the undeniable facts to the opposing counsel in a clear and comprehensive manner. She stood up for me, she protected me, and she gave me a voice. Despite going up against Tribal Sovereignty, she successfully advocated for me and got me what I needed to move on with my life.

I am forever grateful to have had the Law Firm of Dillion and Findley represent me, specifically Molly. She is my hero! And the rest of the attorneys and staff working at Dillion and Findley; a team of modern-day superheroes!

I don’t know what kind of law firm you attended but if an employer discriminates an employee based on sex, race, nationality and an employee leaves it called CONSTRUCTIVE DISCHARGE!!!  Meaning I was forced to quit!!! MEANING I HAVE A CASE! I hope this comment would help other people think twice before calling this law firm!

I was not a party to the litigation but knew several people on both sides. The trial lasted a month and the Dillon & Findley trio skillfully exposed a corrupt Anchorage municipality and their client glaringly prevailed. I HIGHLY RECOMMEND this law firm. reviews.text: I recently found myself in need of a good Workmen’s Comp. Lawyer.  Luckily, I found Carson Honeycutt of Honeycutt Law. My experience with him was absolutely amazing. He will let you know right up front if he thinks you have a case or not, but if you have a case, he will work very hard to make sure to get you what you deserve. Carson also has a legal aid assistant who is just as amazing as he is. Jenna makes sure that if Carson isn’t available right when you call, she takes your message and she make sure that Carson gets it.  There were times when I had called or sent an email, but hadn’t heard back and Jenna will always call you and let you know what’s going on and why Carson hasn’t gotten back to you yet. She doesn’t leave you hanging wondering what the heck is going on. I can’t stress enough about how great Carson and Jenna are. Believe me if you have a Workmen’s Comp. case and need an attorney. I would definitely go with Carson Honeycutt of Honeycutt Law.

reviews.text: I highly recommend Jeff Vance. He is an experienced and knowledgeable attorney. I received an an extremely favorable outcome for my FTCA case due to his legal prowess.  Jeff is also pleasant and easy to work with!  If you are ever in the unfortunate circumstance that requires his area of law,  he will definitely advocate for you.

When life happens and you require an attorney, it can be difficult to find the right partner to help you and your family. Jeff is so knowledgeable and his guidance has helped me and my daughters tremendously. I am so grateful to be represented by Jeff and the firm. His professionalism, mentorship, and no-nonsense approach helped us clearly understand the law and what actions we needed to take. Jeff is the type of attorney who cares about his clients and goes above and beyond to deliver positive outcomes. He is really great at setting expectations and creating a legal strategy to ensure fair and equitable results are achieved. Jeff also has a strong network of legal professionals inside and outside of the firm. He is able to recommend specialists when a legal matter falls outside of the firm’s core competencies. It was a pleasure working with Jeff and I would highly encourage you to call him if you need a top notch attorney to represent you.

I called him about my case and received great insight!
Mr. Vance is professional and timely. I appreciate his and his teams work.
Very professional! He answered all my questions and I felt like I was heard. I would highly recommend if anyone is looking for someone to help with a personal injury claim.

Thank you for your hard work and working extra hard to ensure our success. When you're mourning and at a loss of what comes next the last thing you need to feel is like you're inconveniencing someone. That's what I felt when I called this firm. I'm glad I was the one who called and not the family member who is the beneficiary. Enormous lack of compassion.
I have been trying to get in touch with the office since April 2020, I know the Covid19 has slowed everything down but I would appreciate  Contact

10.2018: Gayle is routinely available to translate documents and tactics taken by the other party. I have been on a pay arrangement with Gayle, and without her kindness I would not be able to afford counsel. I am more than pleased with Gayle's office and services.

2018: just want to thank Gayle and her office for all she does. She is a very busy lady, but that doesn't stop this powerhouse. So far i have no complaints about her, just more questions to our judges in the circuit..

September 2017: all is well again. The office was simply flooded with a slough of court appearances in both Anchorage and the valley. This office works like no other.

July 2017 no one has been returning emails or anything. Seems very out of the blue. Not sure what has transpired here to cause this. Certainly alarming. I've gotten an invoice but no return to phone calls or emails. This is certainly different than what i experienced starting out.

Feb 2017 Have been working with this office for a while now. They are very busy and sure to this sometimes take a while to get back to you.  So far, I'd recommend them

Monday Jan 8, 2018:
I hired attorney Gayle Brown to assist/represent me for a very complex situation. As a criminal justice major and former army all source intelligence analyst, I gathered all of the evidence and research she needed to make the best defense for me. At first, she seemed like a "go get'em," "bulldog" attorney. I am learning that is not the case.

After my $5,000 retainer fee was carved down to $1,000, the only thing that had been done was a review of my evidence and a letter to my ex regarding the situation.

Responses are very untimely. Also, most interaction will be with the paralegal who will fill you with false hope. I have been told several times that certain action will be taken at a certain date. When I ask for an update, I do not receive a response, and nothing has been done.

Absolutely terrible customer service as of this point.
Thank you for all your help and understanding. You helped me more than you know. Excellent attorney and great person too!
