reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Rodney! While the case was a wild ride that went to the Supreme Court, we knew we had the facts and law on our side.

reviews.text:
Things you need to know about Evan:
-He's extremely responsive and ensures that you can reach him at any time- including after hours and on weekends
-He's well versed in Alaska family law and can give you realistic expectations for your case while also advocating for your best interest.
-He will not let the opposing party, or the judge, bully you into accepting something that isn't fairly in your best interest.
-He's thorough and detail-oriented. He will pay attention to the nuances of your case and won't allow things to fall through the cracks.

Now, my full review:

I found Evan in August 2023 after being blindsided by an unexpected custody modification motion that was based on lies and hurtful accusations. I am in Illinois. My originally custody agreement was created in Alaska, albeit my child had never been in Alaska. Her father filed there for dissolution and was willing to give me full custody so the divorce was uncontested and child custody was wrongfully established in the wrong state.

Evan responded to the motion to modify with a request to vacate the original custody order entirely- as it was wrongfully established. The judge denied our motion, but Evan was very confident that his ruling was wrong and offered the option of taking my case to the Supreme Court with a Petition for Review (similar to an appeal). After 10 months of fighting endless motions from the other side (all of which were filled with hurtful lies and damaging accusations), and having a hearing at the Supreme Court, my Petition for Review was granted and my original custody order in Alaska was vacated. My custody case is now in Illinois, the rightful jurisdiction.

Throughout this entire time, Evan recieved almost weekly emails from me. Many custody disputes occurred between the opposing party and I. Evan responded to me promptly- including addressing emergencies on the weekends AND over the Thanksgiving holiday. He always gave honest advice and was empathetic to my complex and nerve-wracking situation. Although I have absolutely no legal education, when I brought case law or hypotheticals to his attention he willingly listened and provided further insight. He never made me feel as though I was wasting his time.

When Evan spoke to witnesses and professional advocates who work with my child he was courteous, respectful, and took notes of their concerns. He treated my case as if he was fighting for his own child and understood all of the intricacies involved.

He did all of this, while never meeting me in person. I fought this entire case, with his help, from my home in Illinois. We interacted through the phone and email. Even so, as my contract with Evan comes to a close, I can say with full honesty that Evan is the best lawyer I ever could have asked for. He genuinely cares for his clients. The cases he takes on, he puts 110% effort into. He is honest, professional, well-spoken, and extremely educated in Alaska law. In the unfortunate situation that I need an AK lawyer again in the future, Evan is the ONLY person I'll go to. If any of my friends or family in Alaska need a lawyer, Evan is the ONLY person I'd recommend. If anyone reading this review is wondering if they need to give Evan a call- I'll end my review, right now, so you can start dialing his number. In the midst of a heartbreaking family law case, having Evan by your side will be the best choice you make.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Ms. Maynor,

Thank you very much for your review. Also, thank you for being an amazing client and trusting the process. While it was frustrating having to go to the Alaska Supreme Court, we all knew that the correct outcome was finally reached.

reviews.text:
**⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Evan Barrickman: The Best Advocate in the Toughest Times ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️**

I can't express enough gratitude for Evan Barrickman, who guided me through one of the most challenging periods of my life. My divorce was not just difficult; it was a worst-case scenario with false accusations thrown at me over six times to try and sway custody. Despite the overwhelming odds, Evan never lost faith in me and provided unwavering support and expert guidance.

Evan's honesty and integrity stood out throughout the entire process. He never made empty promises and always gave me a realistic perspective, which was both comforting and crucial in navigating the legal complexities. His dedication and relentless pursuit of justice resulted in me obtaining 100% legal and physical custody for over a year. This period was invaluable, as it allowed me to give my children the peace and stability they needed.

In the end, we settled on a 50/50 co-parenting arrangement, and I am confident that without Evan's expertise, this favorable outcome wouldn't have been possible. He provided a strong foundation for my children and me to transition into a healthy co-parenting relationship.

If you need a lawyer who will fight for you with unwavering commitment and honesty, look no further than Evan Barrickman. He is not just a lawyer; he is an advocate and a beacon of hope in the darkest times. Thank you, Evan, for everything you've done for my family and me.

reviews.ownerResponse:
Darrin:
Thank you for taking the time to submit a review. Our team takes great pride in achieving our clients’ goals in the most reasonable manner possible. We also take feedback seriously as it will make our practice better. While we will use your feedback to improve our client services, we do stand by the results that we were able to achieve. Our team came into the case late for another attorney, we achieved all of the desired goals at trial, and we dedicated significant time over the holidays (a few years ago) to achieve your desired goals.
Sometimes, when clients have achieved their primary goals at trial, they then want to focus on other aspects of the case that were not part of the original goals. Moreover, part of our job for clients is to make unemotional business decisions for the client and to give candid advice. In some instances, a client’s desired goals do not coincide with our advice, which can lead to a discontinuation in representation.
Our team is proud of the work that we did on your case. We do appreciate your review, and we will take the critical feedback accordingly to continue to improve our client focused legal practice going forward.

We do charge for consultations as we generally provide legal advice during the consultation process. Our firm uses modern technology to connect with clients and potential clients. reviews.text: My husband is in the Army, and he was served a Notification of Discharge.  Our family is a single income family, and we rely on the income that the Army provides, which includes the health insurance.  We were devastated how our family could be affected by discharge.  After careful consideration, we decided to seek civilian representation to support us through the discharge process.  We contacted Carlson Law Group, LLC based on the firm’s experience and reputation in military matters.  Brad Carlson and Heather Hemenway were the attorney and paralegal assigned to our case.  The two of them listened to our concerns, reviewed the Notification of Discharge, and found numerous legal errors.  Moreover, they provided the command with information regarding our family circumstances along with my husband being retaliated against.  In the end, the command discontinued the discharge process, and my husband’s military career is saved!  This stressful situation is such a relief for our family, and we could not have done it without the help of Carlson Law Group, LLC.
reviews.ownerResponse: This is great news, Shaina. Thank you for allowing our team to help you and your family. Serving those that serve our Nation means a great deal to our team of veterans!

Ms. Webster,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. I’m sorry to hear that your experience with our office did not meet your expectations.

To clarify, our administrative staff is not permitted to provide legal advice or details regarding case-review decisions. Their role is limited to conveying whether our attorneys are able to move forward with a consultation. In your situation, the attorneys determined that we would not be able to assist, and we notified you promptly in order to avoid having you incur any consultation fees unnecessarily. We wish you the very best in finding representation that fits your needs.

I highly recommend Jennifer to anyone needing someone who is there for them during one of the most difficult times in their lives.  She was a blessing to our family.

reviews.text: Thank you Mr. Dennis for your efforts on my workers comp case. Having dealt with a discriminatory doctor and an insurance company with no compassion or empathy, it was so reassuring to have you as support. I highly recommend Mr. Elliot Dennis for the underdog who was injured on the job. It is a long process with workers comp, so don't wait last minute, get what you are owed.

I just spent over an hour on the phone with Mr Dennis. He didn't have much in the way of good news.

That doesn't mean it wasn't an extremely valuable conversation. He didn't tell me much that I wanted to hear, but he did give me a lot of reality. The reality is that we don't live in a country where workers are valuable or protected - we are a replaceable product of a toxic environment. Worker's "compensation" does very little to actually compensate us, even for devastating injuries, even when the process goes more or less smoothly.

Mr Dennis won't be my lawyer, because I don't have a case. But he is an extraordinarily knowledgeable, highly capable attorney, and if I were in a position to require one, he is the one I'd want representing me in this area. I spoke to several other law offices today and his was the only one worth talking to. He was the only one that didn't talk over me, or mispronounce my name after being corrected THREE times, or have to take a minute to mentally reconcile with the fact that, yes, girls ARE allowed to work on the slope now (we can vote, too, but I didn't want to lay too much on this poor guy all at once).  He listened to my entire experience, he didn't interrupt me or talk over me...he just explained the laws relevant to my case.  He wasn't dismissive because I don't have one and he didn't talk down to me because I hoped I did.

Thank you for your time today. I appreciate you.

Knowledgeable, Friendly, and Firm attorney. Would definitely recommend you give him a call if you have any legal issues regarding Workers Compensation. Elliott is assiduous in his dealings with his potential clients.

I met Elliott Dennis almost 10 years ago after I was injured on the job. I was working in AK and was injured and with no experience on dealing with one of the largest insurance company in the world I was overwhelmed and stressed out. I figured I could deal with it but these insurance companies are ruthless and will do anything to make your life HELL!!! After the first visit with Elliott and his staff, I felt such relief when he told me that he would handle everything for me.
I feel Elliott and his firm are good friends of mine because not only did they make sure all my needs were taken care of they also were there to answer any questions pertaining to my case even 10 years down the road and after I moved back to the lower 48. If you are looking for the Best attorney to take on your Injury Case I would Recommend ELLIOTT DENNIS to anyone. Thank you Elliott and staff for all you have done for me!!!

Prompt and responsive to requests for general guidance and advice even though we hadn't retained his services. Provided useful information on navigating the workers compensation process based on experience.

Has been working with me to help me get done what is right. He listens and does not make you feel like you've wasted time or small. What happened to me was unfortunate and I feel bad for others who get work injuries and get neglected by employers. I would use him again if I had to but hopefully I won't need to.
Truly understands the working man an how an injury can truly make life difficult

The best. Kind and thorough

I have time sensitivity and need immediate representation for my upcoming problems in civil and criminal court then he takes the case and immediately notified me he can't talk to me for a month! Guys the worst lawyer yet and that's saying a lot in public pretenders world of nonsense.

We appreciate the hard work and dilugence, and how he genuinely cared about my husband's situation and made and honest effort to help him fight his case... In my opinion unlike atleast half of any other lawyers especially the public defenders not all of them but most that ive dealt with for anything or have seen at work, Ember is empathic towards his clients and listens to his clients standpoint, he makes them feel comfortable being honest. It seems to me that he realize's that in a majority of the cases that come across his desk, that peoples Live's, freedom, career's etc. are on the line so he takes it very serious instead of trying to find the fastest and easiest way to have his client's quickly agree with any kind of deal just to hurry and close the case just so they can get paid or whatever like I have unfortunately seen happen quite often here in the state of Alaska... So thanks again Ember S. Tilton for all you've done and continue to do for my husband... Obviously  everyone will  probably not agree with us but that's fine, everyone has their own opinion... I highly recommend Ember Tilton if you or your loved one  ever find yourselve's in a sticky situation call ember he is affordable and reliable....  - JAKE&CYNTHIA LISH

I would definitely recommend this law firm to anyone needing legal help and I will retain them again in the future if I need to.

Seth Dinkel is an honest, hardworking, and kind attorney and friend. He strives, and succeeds, to go above and beyond for each and every one of his clients. reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Mr. Lindley, Our firm is licensed to practice law in Alaska. Our attorneys practice in Alaska and are not permitted to represent clients in other states. Because you are in Arizona, we were unable to assist with your matter or provide legal representation.  We understand this may have been frustrating, ethical, and licensing rules prevent attorneys from practicing outside the jurisdictions where they are admitted. Our team does strive to respond promptly and provide general direction, when possible, even when we are unable to accept a case due to practice and licensing limitations.

reviews.text:
2 generations of Alaska lawyers with 50 years of representing Alaskans
Rock on

I am a Korean traveler who had an unexpected traffic accident while visiting Alaska.
Despite the long-distance communication between Korea and Alaska, Kelly and Canterbury were always professional, kind, and reassuring during our Zoom meetings.
Their experience, clear judgment, and dedication led to a very satisfying outcome.
They turned a difficult experience into a positive memory.
Highly recommended — the Kelly & Canterbury team is truly exceptional.

I was rear ended by a speeding driver who never even touched her brakes before she smashed into me when I was stopped at a red light.  My car was totaled, I was injured, andI was totally disoriented by everything that happened to me following this senseless event.

I was utterly overwhelmed by the magnitude of the collision.

Knowing that I needed the assistance of a qualified attorney I reached out to Kelley and Canterbury.

The day that I met with Michaela she spent over three hours talking to me while I cried, while I vented, while I was totally at a loss as to what I could do or what I could expect.  When I walked out of her office I felt at peace for the very first time after the collision.

I was able to leave all of the legal matters in the very adept hands of Michaela and her team while I did PT and attended counseling.  My physical and mental wellbeing were my responsibility; the legal matters were Michaela’s.

I never worried about any of the legal wranglings.  I knew I was in very good hands with Michaela and her team.  They would reach out to me if needed and when I reached out to them they were always responsive in short order.

My life was turned upside down.  Michaela and her team treated me with dignity and I knew that I was seen; such a vital affirmation after the horrible experience at the hands of a careless person who thought me invisible as she crashed through my vehicle at a red light.

When I found myself in a horrible crisis I had the great fortune of finding Michaela and her team.  I trusted her completely from the very first time I met with her, and the results of my settlement with an obscenely under-insured careless driver proved that my trust was well placed.

When life leaves you reeling because you are the victim of actions by another person, I believe you will be safe in the very empathetic and legally astute hands of Kelley and Canterbury.  Life is hard even on the very best day, and on the worst days Michaela is the professional that you want in your corner.

My husband Marco and I have known Michaela and Chris for many years. They are wonderful people and lawyers and have been supportive to our community in many ways.
More recently they provided us with some valuable advice on a legal question. Michaela in particular shared a way through a difficult situation we encountered. Her advice resulted in us providing a solution so that all parties were satisfied. We can’t thank them enough for their support, their professionalism and their kindness.

I have loved working with Michaela and her team. I was in a car accident in September of 2023 and was getting absolutely nowhere with the drivers insurance company. I was initially offered an amount of money that was an extreme joke. I contacted Michaela and my husband and I had a consultation with her. During the consultation she gave us pointers and tips and told us that she thought we could do it on our own so we wouldn’t have to give a portion of my settlement to a lawyers office. This spoke volumes with me as she wasn’t all about just making money. She was willing to give us advice and tell us things I could do to not have to give a portion of the settlement to a lawyer and it didn’t cost us anything. The consultation was completely free. However, she said that if I still couldn’t get anywhere she’d be more than happy to work with me.

I tried all the tips and pointers she gave me and after a couple more months of fighting with the drivers insurance company and not getting anywhere I ended up hiring her. From the moment I signed the papers her and her team were there for me. They asked questions about how I was doing both mentally and physically which meant a lot. I had all of my questions answered and so did my husband. They took over with the doctor’s offices and hospital that I’d been dealing with that had liens on the amount of money I owed them. They were extremely thorough with everything. Anytime they needed information they let me know and as soon as I gave them the information they were always quick to respond and let me know if they needed anything else from me. All my emails and phone calls were answered in a timely manner, so I wasn’t left waiting and wondering. They made everything easier and took the stress of having to do it on my own where I wasn’t getting anywhere with the insurance company away. I just received a partial payout recently that was a bit over 8 times what the insurance company’s initial offer was.

They have a nice warm inviting office, with friendly staff that make you feel welcome from the moment you walk in the door. Michaela is very knowledgeable in what she does and was able to answer all of mine and my husband’s questions. She made us feel at ease during the entire process. I’d highly recommend her and her team if you’re in need of a personal injury attorney for any reason.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ The Best Customer Service and Advocacy We Could Have Asked For

We first tried to handle our claim on our own, but after weeks of frustration and feeling completely defeated, we reached out to Kelley & Canterbury. From the very first conversation, they treated us with kindness, patience, and genuine care.

Instead of immediately pushing us to hire them, they gave us clear guidance and encouragement to try again on our own — something that showed us they truly put the client’s best interest first. When it became clear we still couldn’t get the result we needed, we decided to officially hire them. That’s when Michaela stepped in and worked tirelessly to secure the proper settlement we deserved.

Throughout the process, communication was excellent. Every question was answered promptly, every step was explained in plain language, and we always felt like we were a priority. They balanced professionalism with compassion, making a stressful situation so much easier to navigate.

Kelley & Canterbury didn’t just represent us — they stood beside us. Their dedication, honesty, and personal touch are rare to find, and we are deeply grateful for the outcome they achieved. If you want a team that will truly be on your side, at your side, every step of the way, this is the firm to call.

Kelley and Canterbury are very professional and knowledgeable about the laws in Alaska.  Chris worked with my family to obtain the very best outcome for our situation and we are extremely pleased with him and the entire firm.
Kelly And Canterbury are the best!  They fought hard for me to get everything possible.   I would give them 100 stars!!

If you want an attorney that will get the job done, call Michaela at Kelley & Canterbury- I always knew what was going on with my case. Kelley &Canterbury is a great team that worked with me and exceeded my expectations.

This review is long overdue. I know it will make Michael's day when she sees it <3. My CASES (yes plural) were complicated and Michaela and Anastasia handled all my mood swings like true champs. I endured two personal injury incidents within a short period of time. To make things even more complicated, I had preexisting conditions and I was a full time Uber driver. It wasn't easy getting all that was due to me but Michaela came through. There were moments that I lost hope. I'm grateful to this team for setting proper expectations with me so I didn't get my hopes too high. I would rather not expect something and be surprised, then to expect it and not get it. I ended up being pleasantly surprised. For me, my experience with Kelly and Canterbury reinforced the concept of "trust the process". I didn't always trust the process...but you should. Michaela is a fighter and I'm so grateful for her compassion and strength even when I had doubts and was not the easiest to work with. From the bottom of my heart, THANK YOU!!!!

Michaela is so articulated and patient!  she explains details that are sometimes complicated and hard to understand. Their office is very friendly and her staff is very helpful. She did an excellent job representing us in regards to our car wreck. Highly recommend them.

I can’t thank Michaela enough for the dedication and professionalism she showed in handling my case. From day one, she was thorough, attentive, and genuinely invested in my well-being. The insurance company made the process difficult, but Michaela remained steadfast, fighting hard to secure a fair settlement that truly reflected the losses I experienced. Her expertise and clear communication helped put me at ease during a challenging time. I highly recommend Michaela to anyone in need of a strong advocate.

Chris at Kelly & Canterbury was great. My fiance and I were in a serious car accident that the troopers declared non fault even though there was obvious evidence that the other driver lost control. Chris fought for us and treated us like family. Highly recommend them.

It isn't often that one finds compassion, understanding, and dedication to helping others, as I found with the law firm of Kelley and Canterbury LLC.  Their willingness to help in making my legal problems easier to handle was impressive and appreciated.  If you are having personal injury problems, please contact this firm , you will not be disappointed.

I cannot recommend Kelley & Canterbury high enough.  These are good quality people who truly care about their clients, not just the results.  The office environment is friendly and caring, and Chris and Michaela treated us sensitively and achieved a good outcome with dignity.  I trust their knowledge and judgment.  Thank you for your hard work on our behalf.

Chris and his team did an excellent job in taking care of my claim. Very professional, compassionate and they made the process stress free. I would highly recommend this team if you involved in auto accident. They will take care of you.

It’s hard to fit into a short review how much I would recommend this team. From the lawyers down to the staff (including the lovely canines) - I was only met with warm welcome and nothing but understanding and patience regarding my situation. Even through a concussion and chaos in my own life - I felt reassured through our conversations and interactions, from every phone call to meeting. I knew the big stuff I didn’t have the ability to comprehend at the time was covered. Dealing with medical alone is scary, but having the knowledge of the whole team took a weight of my shoulders to focus on healing.

I will forever be grateful my concussed brain picked this website because of the dogs - because it turned out to be one of the greatest decisions I could have made given my situation.
Treated me very well and went above and beyond to do what they could for me.

**** UPDATE: It happened again! I was once again hit by an inattentive driver. This time the case was trickier, because I was still seeing doctors for injuries sustained from the LAST inattentive driver (put down the phones, people!!) And instead of a car insurance company, this time we were dealing with a corporate entity (owner of a valet parking service) so not at all a run-of-the-mill case. Michaela expertly untangled my damages from the prior accident and got me a good settlement. I don’t know if any other attorney would have been able to do it. I really hope I don’t need her help again, but if I do, I know I’m in great hands. ****
I highly recommend Michaela Canterbury! After my car accident I couldn't imagine dealing with car insurance investigators while also dealing with my injuries. Michaela and her staff handled everything and kept me informed of the case progress every step of the way. Michaela took care of the insurance company so I could focus on healing.

No one ever wants to be in a car accident but as Michaela will tell you there will be 3, and I will be going to them every time. They have made a very stressful situation so easy and comfortable. Michaela and her team are there every step of the way and make everything so easy. They take the time to explain everything in a way that you can understand and feel comfortable about moving forward. There has never been a time where I didn't think they were on my side and fighting for the absolute best outcome. If you need representation I wouldn't think twice about contacting Kelley and Canterbury.

Kelley and Canterbury are more than amazing. They made me feel like family, they cared about the pain my family and I experienced after our accident, emotionally and physically. The staff in the office are incredibly hard working, positive and make you feel part of the team. We will choose Kelley and Canterbury every time!

In 50 years, I’ve never had to work with an attorney, heck I even used a mediator for my divorce…but I’m so glad I reached out to Michaela at Kelley and Canterbury when paperwork, phone calls, medical were all becoming too much to deal with. I needed to take care of myself and concentrate on healing. Michaela and her amazing staff let me do just that. They handled all the unfun steps and confusing lingo that goes into MVA/insurance and kept me updated throughout the process. Sincere thanks Michaela for taking such good care of me. I can not recommend her and her staff enough.

I cannot recommend the team at Kelley & Canterbury enough. From start to finish of my claim they took care of everything. The office staff was knowledgeable and the attorney handling my case was always prompt to respond to my calls & made himself available to answer any of my questions that the office personnel couldn’t. Being in their office always felt like being with family which made asking my uneducated questions so much easier for me.
Kelley and Canterbury absolutely went above and beyond for me and I am positive their team would do that same for you. I hope you never need them but IF YOU DO… they definitely got you!
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Julie, thank you for the 5-star ratings. We are pleased to help you and answered all your concerns regarding your case. We are glad that our service, meets your expectations.

reviews.text: Kelley and Canterbury are excellent. Chris explained the process very clearly. The staff is caring and will promptly return phone calls or emails. My case was complicated, and Chris and the staff were very thorough with my medical records and worked hard on getting other medical records from years ago from another state. I truly am grateful to have had Kelly and Canterbury represent me.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Marla, thank you for taking the time to leave a review. We are so glad that we were able to meet your expectations when we handled your case. Have a great day!

reviews.text: Kelly and Canterbury is the best place to go if you need an attorney. They helped me when I was in an accident in late 2021. They checked in with me and found ways to get in touch with me even when I changed my phone number. They have the best customer service. They really make you feel like you’re at home and they make sure they will get the most they can for you and your family no matter what. I will definitely be using them for all my future legal needs.

My fiance and I were involved in a serious car accident Christmas 2019 that the troopers on-scene declared it to be no fault. I didn't know what to do because i was 11 weeks pregnant at the time and my fiance had to have major surgery done on his hip that came along with a long recovery period. Kelley met with us at the hospital while my fiance was still recovering and we told him about our car accident and agreed to help us. It was a long process but the resulting outcome of our case was worth it because they were helpful and thorough and made us feel like family.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the 5-star rating, Brianna! We value you as our client, and we are glad you enjoyed our service. We are looking forward to working with you soon.

reviews.text: Mr Canterbury saw me very quickly. Both he and Marie were helpful and responsive during my whole claim. Thank you for all you have done. Will definitely recommend!

Effective, Intelligent, Caring and Available, Micheala uses her professional  brilliance to sincerely improve the quality of life for others. An advocate for planning ahead and utilizing resources skillfully, Micheala and her team are the ones to reach out for support in protecting the ones you love the most in a car. Thank you!

Everyone in this office is very professional, they handled everything in my case while I healed from my car accident. They are AMAZING. They have good quality customer service and truly care about their clients. 10/10 would recommend for anyone in need of legal help!

Kelley and Canterbury LLC has been very helpful with guiding me legally in my personal needs and questions.  Always quick to respond, so professional and friendly.  I have always felt as though my concerns were heard and were a priority.  I highly recommend this law office!!

Highly recommend! Chris and the entire Kelly and Canterbury team where awesome! Can’t thank them enough! They where respectful, kindhearted, and always put me as the client first! They walked me through every step of my case and made sure I was aware of everything going on with the case. Chris was extremely knowledgeable and knew how to get me taken care of.  Thank you Kelly and Canterbury!

My family and I had a wonderful experience with Kelley and Canterbury. From the first contact they were professional, personable and accommodating. They set up an appointment promptly and were already prepared for our first meeting. They were very aggressive with the other party and made sure we were comfortable with the outcome. They checked on us often and gave updates on a normal basis. I didn’t feel like just another paycheck with them. They treated us like real human beings with emotions and concerns. Micheala always took her time and made sure we understood what was going on. She was very precise and explanatory. She pulled no punches and didn’t sugar coat anything. Marie answered any and all questions and kept people off our backs. If you need representation, this should be your first stop. No one else in town will treat you as wonderfully as they will. I would recommend them 10 times over.

I had a very satisfactory experience with the firm of Kelley and Canterbury. I had already inquired at two other popular personal injury lawyers in Anchorage who said they couldn’t help me but Michaela and her team were willing and able to get me the settlement I deserved. The outcome was much better than I had anticipated. Michaela is a very understanding and personable attorney.

There may be a need at some point in your life to engage an attorney to represent yourself or someone you know.  Legal procedures are seldom simple, so having someone to guide you through this gauntlet is so very important.
As a past client, I can highly recommend the law office of Kelley and Canterbury.  Michaela and Chris are a perfect team, and you want them on your side. They are just very real people and they treated me like family. I think their dogs even liked me.
They have the experience to see if the case is credible, the commitment or follow it through to fruition, and the patience and understanding to work with their clients through it all. The truth is; if you need a real advocate in a legal issue you need to call them.
Bill H

The staff was like my family and were by my side from beginning to end. Chris was very supportive and was able to bring a win to my personal injury case when I was not so confident. I would recommend Kelley and Canterbury for any lawsuit as they are all very professional, patient and like family.

I’m so grateful to have had Kelly and Canterbury and their staff to help through such a difficult time. I went to them for my auto accident and couldn’t be more happy with the outcome. They’re always on top of answering any and all my questions and very knowledgeable. They really went to bat for me and I know this process was a lot less painful because I had them in my corner. I could not thank them enough!

My experience with Kelley and Canterbury has been extraordinary! They handled my case efficiently and with professionalism. Their thorough knowledge of Alaska law, claims, litigation made this process very simple. They answered any question I had in a timely fashion and with great depth. I would recommend them to any friend or family member as I am forever grateful for their hard work.
Michaela and Chris are truly exceptional attorneys and people in general. They are particular about taking care with each clients needs and have shown compassion throughout my experience. Marie has also been an outstanding addition to their team as a paralegal. I would highly recommend Kelley and Canterbury, LLC.

Michaela was the only lawyer willing to  look at my case.  Although it took longer to get a settlement, ( the "other" party was non compliant") I was consistently put at ease with Michaela's wit, humor and personality.  I never felt like my case did not matter, she was professional and personable with positive results and  was able to negotiate some medical bills to below half the cost!!  If the need arose to use her again, I would not hesitate.

Michaela Canterbury exceeded all my expectations with her knowledge and professional work ethics. Over 10 firms had turned my case down and I was ready to give up. Mrs. Canterbury was able to help me process memories and emotions that might have been overlooked and always had a lighthearted approach with good humor that lifted my spirit. An excellent team bar none!

Margie and I were in a predicament, she had contracted Gillian Barre and was paralyzed.
In the stress and distraction of the hour, and the mounting medical bills, I was unsure where to turn.
The staff of Kelly and Canterbury brought hope during the time when we believed we had been injured, and no one cared.
I would recommend this firm to anyone who needed an advocate in the legal system.

Chris Canterbury was here for me and my family when we needed him the most. He is so good at what he does and I would recommend him to anyone who is looking for an attorney who will fight for them! His office staff is so friendly and always available to answer any questions along the way.

I used Kelley & Canterbury back in 2003, when I was hit by an unlicensed driver. They came highly recommended to me by several people, and I am definitely glad I made the choice to contact them. Not only did they ensure that our medical bills were taken care of, they also explained that long-term medical issues was to be something that needed to be addressed. Boy, were they right! It's been 13 years now, and I still deal with issues from that wreck. Highly recommend, and thanks Kelley & Canterbury!

I would like to thank Kellley & Canterbury for their service after having been involved in an accident. Their approach focused on the wellbeing of everyone, and enabled us to focus on medical treatment, while they handled the difficult legal aspects. I appreciate the compassion which they brought and their willingness to bring justice.

I more than appreciated the the stellar service I received from Kelley & Canterbury! It is obvious my attorney has a deep understanding of the law but also other insurance companies, the court system, and how things generally go in personal injury cases. Michaela made sure I understood what to expect for the long process ahead of us but even more important, she was empathetic to what I was going through post-accident. Michaela and her staff were extremely patient with me as I posed my questions throughout and they always followed through on what they promised. Always.

Having never been through a personal injury case before I didn't know what to expect a far as the process but also, what would be a reasonable settlement. They helped me to understand all of it and helped me arrive at a fair settlement amount. Michaela advocated for me as if I were a member of her family. I think it's because she truly cares about people; their suffering and loss, not just the eventual pay day.

Great attorney, very helpful staff.  We had an international injury claim, and through a very difficult time, she helped us find and clarify answers until we were able to reach a satisfactory settlement.  Professional, personal, efficient, and trustworthy.  I highly recommend Kelley & Canterbury, LLC.

Very caring and really committed to helping in any way he can. He was very helpful every step of the way in our adopting our great-grandson and gave us very positive answers to our concerns. Being in our 60s we just wanted him not to go through the system and keep in with us. Ken said "family is family" that's all that matters. It's been over 10 years and I feel I could still call on him for everything.
Helped me with a will. Great job!
KK was a lot of help to me in the past and sent me in the right direction for a new situation that I am dealing with. A great attorney and human being 👌❤️
Excellent with wills and trusts.
Honest, realistic and knows his stuff. Highly recommend.
Favorite family attorney.  Straightforward and does a great job at expediting and resolving legal issues.  I highly recommend Attorney Kirk!,

I never once got to speak to Josh fink only his paralegal they never briefed me on the case they never answered any of my specific questions and he didn't even show up for court because he claimed he had covid the case was pretty open and shut and I probably didn't even need a lawyer but I shelled out 2K for him I'm only granting him two stars because my charges were dropped when I entered the courtroom maybe that was the result of his feeble paralegal showing up but idk
reviews.ownerResponse:
We take feedback seriously and have carefully reviewed our records. At this time, we do not have any record of working with a client under this name. It’s possible there may be some confusion regarding the attorney or firm involved.

That said, we want to clarify a few points for accuracy. Our office communicates with clients both directly and through qualified paralegals as part of standard case preparation, and all matters are handled under attorney supervision. If an attorney is unable to appear in person due to illness, including COVID-related issues, appropriate arrangements are made to ensure the client is represented and the case proceeds as required.

We’re pleased that the charges were ultimately dismissed, which is always the goal for our clients. However, we regret if expectations regarding communication or process were not met. We encourage anyone with concerns about their experience to contact our office directly so we can review the matter and address it appropriately.

reviews.text: He's alright, got the job done never got all of my personal belongings back from evidence but did get a good outcome on my case with the help of the victim in my case pushing for the least damaging charge for my record. Honestly was hoping he would be there when I remanded back to jail but he also had just sent his assistant instead. Definitely is less expensive then some of these lawyers here in town but still expensive as no decent lawyer will be cheap on your pockets especially when your freedom is at risk. Id give him a 4/5 missing that single star just due to the fact mainly he couldn't be there for me when I was going back to jail . Id say for what he charges he's a reasonable lawyer to work with .

Josh Fink really came through for me. Right from the beginning he helped me understand my rights and the process that I was going to experience. Josh was dependable, professional, and knowledgeable. I have made several referrals to Josh and his team.

Josh has been my lawyer throughout a really trying case. Service provided was excellent.
Highly recommend.
Josh represented me with professionalism, courtesy, and aggressive advocacy. I highly recommend Josh.

Worst experience ever! I have never even seen Josh's face! He demanded $5000 in cash immediately. He never showed up in court and his paralegal dealt with my sentencing which was 7 years probation on top of over $5000 in fines not to mention fees. He never showed up for meetings and gave me advice from F Street Bar!! Do not go w this joke of an attorney.

Josh Fink and his team were amazing to work with and his staff really know their industry, response times were always appropriate, Josh Finks staff was friendly, non judging, and informative. I would highly recommend Josh Fink and  his team if you find yourself in need of their services. Josh Fink was great with his consultation, he gave me best and worst case scenarios and that helped me prepare myself. He is worth every penny!!! A huge Thank you to the Law Office of Josh Fink!!!
Mr. Fink and everyone employed in his office were extremely professional, helpful, and knowledgeable.  I would recommend his services for anyone in need of legal help.

Mr. Fink and his team did a great job getting my case dismissed.
I recommend him to anyone looking for legal assistance
Mr. Fink has been so professional and helpful.
They were awesome, helped get me through each step, amazing attitudes, stood up for me and we got the best outcome. Would highly recommend if you're ever in a pickle!!
Staff was very communicative and even though my case was considered aggressive or agitated they drop my charges and got me the lowest sentenced possible
Huge thank you to Josh Fink, Kael MacMaster, Adam Lees, Jonathan Adler and the rest of the team.

This office was more than friendly and helpful. Great people, always on top of getting ahold of you and more than helpful with any questions asked. I cannot express how great full I am from their services.

Josh Fink did a great job with my case!  His knowledge of the ins and outs of the Alaska Court System and the strategy that he employed yielded the best possible outcome in my case.  His staff were kind and responsive.  All were a pleasure to work with.
Not only was he diligent at looking over my case but he kept me privy to all findings as well as a very nice and personable guy. I can't thank him enough for everything he has done for me.

Josh Fink did an awesome job getting my case dismissed.  He was very diligent and extremely thorough in his representation of me.  I would highly, highly recommend him as an attorney to handle your case, whether you are a victim of a motor vehicle accident or a criminal matter.  Thanks Josh for doing such a fantastic job for me.

We won! Josh took on my case when others said I didn’t have a good case and it would be a waste on time and money to fight. Josh worked on my case for over 2 years, and he got my case dismissed without ever having to go to trial. I only had to go to court once because he took care of everything. I also was not surprised by any extra fees after my first initial payment to hire Josh.  I cried happy tears for hours when I found out the great news. So happy I chose to hire him. I am forever grateful.

I’m a veteran, did not work to place my case with veterans court, never returned emails: claimed he wasn’t an email type person, made rude comments to me that make it appear he has issues with females, did not aggressively advocate for me. Would not recommend.

I contacted a few law offices before I finally came across The Law Office of Joshua P. Fink. The way they greeted me made me feel like a very important client and Mr. Fink took note of any and every detail of my case I had at the time. He his very military friendly and Mr. Fink made my family feel very confident with him by our side the entire time. He is straight forward and went completely out of is way to assure the best possible out come for my case. I am very grateful for their excellent job. To anyone needing or looking for a Defense Attorney, I highly recommend giving his office a call. If I ever need one again, I will gladly come back  and ask him to represent me.

I recommended Mr. Fink to handle a close friend's DUI case.   He immediately handled an initial problem because of his good relationship with the DA's office and his excellent understanding and knowlege of the law.   Then he handled a hearing in the case remarkably.   He knew the law and made appropriate procedural suggestions to the Court.  It is obvious that he is extremely intelligent.   He was firm, but respectful and professional, in his presentation to the Court, and in his cross-examination of witnesses.  His approach and strategy was effective and rendered a positive result.   He continued to be very responsive in subsequent proceedings and won a tough battle in the case.  I would recommend him again in a heartbeat.
My buddy tell me great afforadble attorney will help u..get back on your feet.

Needing an attorney is already stressful, Jason Wiener office has been nothing but ethical, responsive, and cost effective , helping me every step of the way. My attorney, Chris Bodle, has been honest, professional, and has truly made a very stressful situation much less overwhelming. Their former paralegal, Jenn, was also great during the initial process and very supportive. It’s rare to find a law firm that is genuinely honest and ethical, but this team absolutely is. I would highly recommend them to anyone in need of legal help.

The reason for 1 star is so i can leave a review. Jason Weiner is a joke unless you are recieving lots of money. I brought my casr to him and let him know my situation, at that time he told me to contact h when i was being cut drom bemifits.
Well this started happening so i called just to be told there is nothing he can do because he needed this and that, "WELL SHOULD HAVE SAID SO IN THE BEGINNING"
Long stry short this was a bunch of BS after almost 2 years trying to recover.

I was charged $125 for a ten minute phone call in which Mr. Weimer gave me no information about my situation or legal advise. He did, however, sneer at my charge and pressure me to hire him. I do not recommend him.
Mr. Weiner helped defend my speeding ticket. We went for a trial and I am very happy with the end results.

I met with Kristin Farleigh for a divorce consultation and it was an exceptionally good experience. She was knowledgeable, directed me towards useful advice, and reviewed the documents I'd prepared in our first meeting.

She informed me that I'd completed most of the paperwork and gave tips on how to finish it. I highly respect professionals who are willing to state when their services are not required. If I require legal services in the future, I know who I'll go to
Called  to get a living trust done.  Nobody returned my call.  Guess they don't need the business.
Good lawyer if you need legal advice.

Bill & Wendy helped represent me as I sold my small business and they were incredibly sharp and helpful throughout the process. I am super grateful for them and I give them the highest of recommendations!

Working with Johnson Law has been a phenomenal experience. They are compassionate, hard-working, and understand Alaska law. They helped my family through a very difficult time. Thank you, Johnson Law.
reviews.ownerResponse: We are honored to have assisted you through a difficult time. Thank you for choosing Johnson Law to represent you.

reviews.text: Doug Johnson and his team, I am so thankful for all their time, care, and dedication throughout this long process. Your support truly made a difference and made everything easier to navigate. I'm genuinely grateful to have had such a supportive team!
reviews.ownerResponse: We are honored to have assisted you through a difficult time. Thank you for choosing Johnson Law to represent you.

reviews.text:
Recently I was involved in a head on collision with an uninsured driver.  My son was in the car with me.  We both suffered major injuries and had to be flown by helicopter to the hospital.  I had to undergo 7 different surgeries and my son, who was in a coma for over a week, underwent 11 surgeries.  We both eventually recovered but will never be the same as before the accident.  Thankfully we had a large underinsured policy on my car.  Several friends including one that was an accident attorney told us that we wouldn't need to retain an attorney that this was a very obvious cut and dried case and the insurance company would pay us the policy maximum.  Unfortunately the insurance company didn't see it that way and we finally contacted Doug Johnson to represent us.  We were both completely satisfied with the result as Doug and his staff were able to secure a settlement that exceeded our best hopes.  Thank you Doug and thank you Jaycee for all your help!
Sincerely,
Leigh & Cole Sherwood
reviews.ownerResponse: Your comments about our service are incredibly rewarding! Johnson Law is honored that we could assist you and your son while exceeding your settlement expectations. Thank you again for choosing our firm to represent you.

reviews.text: Such a compassionate staff! Thorough, responsive, and professional. I recommend Johnson Law!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you - we are thankful for our clients and the ability to help those who need us. We appreciate your review.

reviews.text: Great lawyer...

What a refreshing experience!  Not often do you have an attorney take the time on the phone with a client without being charged.  Mr. Wright is compassionate and really cares about his clients.  He even told me that the avenues I could take to avoid spending money.  So honestly he is a rare gem!  I highly recommend him.

This review really will not even going to come close to the amount of gratitude I have for Jimmy White and his team. I would like to start off by saying that if you need someone that will fight hard for you 24/7, Jimmy is your man. I was involved in a custody battle with my ex and used a previous attorney. After an emergency situation, I received full custody of both kids. My ex took me back to court and I decided to use a different attorney and that is when I found Jimmy. He truly is 100% AMAZING in every way, shape and form. He worked tirelessly to get me the outcome I wanted and he did. Shortly after, my ex tried changing the terms of our agreement and Jimmy went right back in fighting hard. He really does have his client's best interest at heart, but more importantly he helped my children and that is something that I will never ever forget. Not only is he a fighter, but he is extremely kind at heart and helps his clients. Negotiations starting stretching out more and more and everyone knows, that can be costly. Jimmy helped myself and my family out in that situation taking into account my finances so I would not have to pay more into the case. He not only looked out for getting me the best outcome for my family, he looked out for my financial wellbeing. He truly cares about his clients and that is what matters most. Thank you Jimmy. Thank you to Jimmy's team. I will never forget what you did for me and I appreciate it more than any words could every say.
Sean was hands down the best representation I could have asked for. I would absolutely recommend him to anyone going through UCMJ. An absolute honor to have him fighting for you.

First and foremost without Sean I wouldn’t be writing an review on how exemplary this man is. If your in a situation where it seems all hope is lost look no further. My peer recommended to call him. I was skeptical at first but through my experience with Sean I was grateful I made the call. I told him my story about my arrest. Sean was straightforward and made an major impact through my case not only that he square away my commanders about my case, but made an effort to make sure I been protected instead of usual lawyers who just waiting for results to happen. He goes above and beyond to handle on my case. I 100% recommended to go through him especially when it comes to his soldiers who’s facing any charges (ucmj or civilian side of the law).
An outstanding lawyer!

Jocelyn Stewart is a powerhouse attorney.  She wrote a book that will become the go to legal resource in preparing motions to represent her clients.  If I were in need of an attorney I would pick her without hesitation
If you want someone who cares about you, and will fight like Hell for you.  You found her.

A top notch advocate and leading authority on military justice issues.  Deeply involved in justice issues across the nation, Jocelyn is always a top choice at the juncture of crime and the military.  You need a specialist for those cases and she literally "Wrote the book."  I strongly endorse her work and she is part of the referral universe for my own dear clients.
A true people’s lawyer that cares and fights and tells the honest truth. I am so glad I got to know her.
Jocelyn is a true warrior! She is a great attorney and is an excellent advocate.
Jocelyn knows trials.
Top notch!  Jocelyn is the real deal.  I greatly admire her work ethic and  talent as an advocate.

As an attorney myself, I'm not easily impressed by other lawyers.  Jocelyn Stewart is the exception.  In an era when over 98% of cases are resolved by plea bargain, Jocelyn is one of the tiny fraction of lawyers who is not only comfortable taking a case to trial but actually looks forward to it.  She is the type of lawyer who strikes fear in the heart of prosecutors.  If you're willing to settle for whatever plea offer a prosecutor throws at you, save your money and take your free court-appointed attorney.  But if you're searching for a champion who will take your case to the mat if that's what it takes to get your justice, stop looking -- Jocelyn's your gal.

Great attorneys are hard to find. Found one here. Thank you for the work you do! You’re a badass.

I pray that your advocacy is infectious so we can get more attorneys like you.

I can't believe how someone could rate Ms. Steward * star.  She's professional and well trained.  You would be well served if Ms. Stewart agrees to take your case.

By the way, isn't it ridiculous that Google allows some random person who had no prior dealings with a lawyer, hold him/her hostage with a * review?
Ms. Stewart is a smart, creative, dedicated, compassionate, and effective advocate. You can do no better than to have her as your lawyer.
A phenomenal attorney and great legal mind!
Lifesaver.

reviews.ownerResponse: We often talk about how great our business model is. We can give our clients the best, white-glove treatment, And it only puts MORE Money in their pocket. Every other attorney and staff that does not practice contingency fee (like we do) has to charge for every phone call, every letter, Every meeting, every pleading. So, when they do hard work for you, the work is good, but it costs you money. But with a good personal injury firm, the hard work means that the case is resolved for more money-Which means that YOU get more money. Many of our lawyers have worked on the defense side, or in other areas of law, Where we had to keep up with every minute that we spent on our clients’ cases and charge them hundreds of dollars an hour for it. Here, no matter how much time we spend on your case, we do not charge you by the hour. The only way that we get more money is if we get the insurance company to pay more money. We truly love this business model, and the way that it allows us to lavish our clients with time and still help their bottom line. Thank you so much for the review!!

THANK YOU CLG!!

Although, I hope I don’t have any issues in the future, if I do, you will most definitely hear from me!

reviews.text: Long story short, my wife was hit by a semi in 2021, totaled-her vehicle and she was injured.  The responsible insurance tried to offer us a settlement while she was still recovering.  Their offer was not sufficient to cover medical and was very frustrating. We needed help. We contacted Crowson Law. Danny (first name only here) took our case.  From that point he handled it all.  I no longer had concerns or had to deal with  the significant stress.  Crowson Law got all medical paid and reimbursed for other damages.  But, in Aug 23, just 2 years later, while in my car parked,  I had a vehicle at full speed run into the rear of my vehicle and totaled  my car and injured me. I knew what to do, I went directly to Crowson Law (Danny). This time the other side insurance was limited. You never know the issues you have to deal with. Since,    I have been in two years of medical services & surgery to assist with injuries.  But, Crowson worked all the issues,  followed my recovery, and took 100% care of any/all issues related to the accident and documented medical recovery. They followed up with me often.  Crowson got us complete resolution to my accident My wife and I have been together 48 years. We have never required legal services.  We were not experienced with all the issues, frustrated, and stressed until We went to Crowson.  We could not have covered the significant cost of medical. The other insurance company was NOT concerned about our best interest.  Crowson Law handled it all. Crowson took the ball, they owned it, no more concern, no real stress, but the time to get through the medical.  We are grateful to Crowson Law and Danny for the outstanding service and care we received. I hope note to require legal services again, But if we do, we will use Crowson Law.  We are thankful for your efforts and results.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the review Nate! We hope that you guys don’t need us again, too- but we will be here for you. It is our real pleasure to deal with nice, patient people who have realistic expectations. We are so happy to  have helped your family during trying times. Good luck going forward!
Thanks for the review!

I had the unfortunate experience of needing legal support after my daughter was involved in a serious accident while biking to school. During such a distressing and uncertain time, I turned to Crowson Law and had the privilege of working with Michael Garland and his team, including Brandi and Christa.

From the very beginning, they demonstrated a high level of professionalism, compassion, and dedication. They were consistently responsive, thorough, and thoughtful in their communication, which brought a great deal of reassurance during a very tough time for our family.

It’s clear that this team genuinely cares about the people they represent. They handled every aspect of our case with diligence and integrity, and I felt supported every step of the way. I’m truly grateful for their guidance and expertise, and I would not hesitate to recommend Crowson Law to anyone in need of personal injury representation.

reviews.text: I would recommend Crowson Law Group to anyone who has been in a car accident, very easy process and very understanding people! I am satisfied with the results of my case and thankful for this team for doing an amazing job! Although getting into a car accident is an event no one ever wishes to experience, working with Crowson Law has shown my fiancé and I that what we went thru has definitely costed us money and time we wish that we didn’t have to spend hurting and recovering from, and thru Crowson Law we have been able to get back onto our feet and definitely help with the next step in our lives! I’ve been working with Julie Fields of Fields Immigration Law LLC since 2019. She is hardworking, dedicated, thorough and above all very honest. She tells us exactly what the process will be, the timeline and what type of results to expect. Our family case was very complicated and no one else was willing to take our case, but Julie Fields took our case and gave us hope.

The process took several years because it involved a deceased petitioner and then a deceased substitute petitioner. Julie Fields was there each step of the way, explaining the process and making sure that we were informed and ensuring that the correct forms were completed and most importantly that we didn’t give up hope. Some of the forms were only valid for a certain amount of time and Julie made sure that we stayed on top of the deadlines and that the forms remained current.

In the end we were successful in obtaining my sister’s green card. If you’re looking for someone who is hardworking and dedicated to your case and does not shy away from complicated immigration processes give Julie Fields a call.

I cannot recommend Attorney Jason Skala highly enough. He exemplifies the very best of what a personal injury attorney should be. From the very beginning, Jason went above and beyond every reasonable expectation—not just with his legal expertise, but with the genuine care, integrity, and dedication he brought to my case.

What truly sets Jason apart is the way he stepped in to resolve a case that had been badly mismanaged by a different law firm I had initially hired. That firm left me in a difficult and messy legal situation, but Jason was able to intervene, correct the course, and ultimately deliver a fair and favorable outcome. He did this with professionalism, grace, and a sincere concern for my well-being—and all while charging a very fair and transparent fee for his services. His actions not only helped clean up the prior firm’s missteps, but also restored my confidence in legal representation.

Jason approaches his work with a deep sense of fiduciary duty and compassion. He treated me not just as a client, but as someone he genuinely cared for—like family. He was responsive, thorough, and committed at every step, and his legal acumen gave me peace of mind throughout the process.

It’s no surprise that Jason has received the highly vetted and coveted Lawyers of Distinction Award for five consecutive years—2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, and 2024. I sincerely hope he earns the same recognition again in 2025, because he truly deserves it.

If you are looking for an attorney who will stand by you, fight for you, and treat your case with the seriousness and compassion it deserves, Jason Skala is the one to call. He has made an incredibly positive impact on my life and the lives of my family, and I am deeply grateful for all he has done.

Anchorage, Alaska

Jason, Ashley and Christan thank you for all your efforts and hard work to get the settlement that I deserved!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Lindsey Bukle,

Thank you so much for taking the time to share your experience with the Law Office of Jason Skala, LLC. We are thrilled to hear that you were satisfied with the care and attention you received following your car accident. Our team, including Jason, Ashley, and Christan, is dedicated to providing outstanding service and ensuring our clients feel supported throughout the process.

Your kind words and recommendation mean a lot to us, and we are grateful for the opportunity to have assisted you in obtaining the settlement you deserved. Should you need any further assistance in the future, please don't hesitate to reach out.

Wishing you all the best,

The Law Office of Jason Skala, LLC

reviews.text: Best law firm, Christian and Jason are outstanding,  so friendly  and very knowledgeable
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Tara. Glad we could help.  We only handle personal injury cases, but  even if we aren’t the right firm for a different kind of case, we will work with you to find the right kind of attorney to solve your problem.

reviews.text: They are the best lawyers really organized
Highly recommended.. Jason is awesome. Kind and really cares for his clients. He made sure I got what was deserved. Thanks Jason
Called this office and they gladly took my case right away with no judgement whatsoever. Jason was extremely informative, professional and helpful! So grateful I chose this law office.

This personal injury law firm provides exceptional service, demonstrating a deep commitment to their clients' well-being and achieving favorable outcomes. The team is highly knowledgeable, responsive, and consistently goes above and beyond to ensure that clients feel supported throughout the legal process. Their expertise and dedication make them a top choice for anyone seeking effective representation in personal injury cases.

A kind gentleman named Christian that answered my inquiry today, he was courteous and professional and very informative. He showed that he cared and provided an environment that made me felt heard. I wanted to say thank you and commend him for providing such excellent customer service I haven’t seen in such a long time. Being such a great advocate to your firm.
Christopher Garcia was great

Jason Skala! Very informative, personal, professional attorney! Huge help when needed most, open eared, listened and sent me in the right direction!
Attorneys like this are wonderful! When you’re in a bind and need help!
5 star all day long!
Very knowledgable, enthusiastic, willing to go the extra mile to try and help us with our insurance claim. Highly recommend!!!
Very knowledgeable,  helpful,  respectful, professional and treats you like a human.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Oni! I try my best to treat anyone that call for help the way I would want to be treated when I need help. You get what you bring in life, so we treat everyone with respect. I'm glad you called and happy to help.

reviews.text: The Law office of Jason Skala is a delight to our family. Mr. Jason personally helped us through a tough time in our lives. A million Thanks is not enough. Ms Shaina Palmer, his paralegal is a peach. You rock, Jason and Shaina.
reviews.ownerResponse: Serving as your family's advocate is an honor. Thank you giving me the opportunity to serve you and for your courage to fight back to the very end. Your family deserved justice and our jury agreed with us.  I'm so very happy we obtained such an outstanding result for such extraordinary people. You have a lawyer for life. : )

reviews.text: I called Jason after searching "lawyers near me" in a search engine.  As his office is just over a mile from where I live, his name came up first, and I made the call. I told him my story and he just said, "I can help you." And he did. Now, the area where I need legal help isn't what he practices, so what he did is, he referred me to a lawyer who does. I'm at a point where I don't know what I don't know, and things are happening fast. His help and his referral were a weight off my shoulders. Additionally, when I went into his office to have the documents he advised notarized, his staff were both warm and inviting even though I wasn't a "paying customer." Jason and his office care. It's refreshing to encounter these days. Thanks, Jason.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for calling and thank you for your kind review.  It’s important to me that we try to get everyone that calls the help that they need, even if your problem isn’t in our wheelhouse.  If you want to stand up for your rights, then we will help you find the help you need. Best of luck with your case!

reviews.text:
I’m very grateful for Jason he gave me a couple referrals of lawyers he used in the past because they are related to my families needs. My husband and I have been searching for someone to help with our case and have yet to find anyone. Thank you Jason for your time to call me call and talk to me not at me.

Jennifer Harris
Harris Notary LLC
Jason cares deeply for his clients and I never hesitate to refer my friends and family to him.

I must say it was an absolute pleasure meeting with Jason Skala and Les. They hold a variety of spectacular traits; knowledgeable, informative, honest, genuine, etc.

While speaking about my case they listened intently and offered thorough information and breakdown. You can tell they don’t just sign on each client that walks through the door for money. They look at each component and help guide you. Whether that’s introducing you to someone else or signing you as a client. Finding a lawyer can be an overwhelming process with many questions unknown, put your ease to rest and reach out to Jason’s office. (I promise you won’t be disappointed)

I was dog bitten over the summer and needed legal help. I reached out to a friend that told me to call Jason Skala. At the very first phone call with Jason, I knew he was a genuine attorney who would fight for what was right for my situation. Honest, reliable, respectful, to the point and he is easy to talk to. Ashley his assistant made emailing back and forth delightful, and would answer my questions with a speedy response. I received more in return than I had excepted. Honestly if I had not contacted Jason Skala to represent me I would have been…in the dog house with unexpected medical bills to pay. He knows the laws through and through.
I highly recommend Law Office of Jason Skala.

The first day I met Mr. Skala I felt completely comfortable to have him as my attorney. I came into his office blindsided and very vulnerable to open up about my case. The first thing Mr. Skala asked me is to talked about the relationship I had with my father. The fact that Mr. Skala showed empathy and compassion, I knew he was the right one for the job. This whole experiences for me was a life changer for me and I’m very grateful that I made the right decision on walking into his office that day.  Thank you again Jason Skala.
Jason Skala is a stand up, respectable lawyer. Easy to work with and a plethra of knowledge and experience. I highly recommend him.

Jason is the bomb. He and his staff always went the extra mile to help with any questions or concerns we had. Jason never brushed us away. Jason and his staff is the team to use if you ever need a great lawyer.  And it makes it even better since Jason is so good looking.

Huge thanks to Jay and his staff for assisting me with my legal needs. Jay answered the phone call promptly and was happy to provide his professional point of view for every question I had. He pointed me in the right direction in preparation with the next several steps moving forward. Aside from my initial issue, he was able to also point me in the direct of additional legal council needed outside of personal injury. Call him even if it is just a simple question! Thank you Jason!
Answered all my questions along with helping me with the right steps to take along my case. -Zachary Belcher

Helped me become well equipped to handle the insurance companies surrounding my car accident. Jason is extremely knowledgeable and personable! I strongly appreciate he and the resources he has available to tackle on the fickle world of insurance, 10/10 would recommend
Jason Skala runs an efficient, responsive practice.  He helped me resolve my issues.  He's a Tough dude.
Needed help with  legal help and direct me in the right direction thank you
Great business. Attorneys in this group are very friendly and, most importantly, helpful in making sure you understand the process of law
Great attorney, super nice staff.
Extremely good Autorneys very experienced
Amazing place..good food..comfortable rooms
Outstanding Estate Plan prepared for me.
Thank you for looking back into concerns and making things good!
Great people. Great service.

This firm deserves 10 stars. We highly recommend Sandon and Cole. They have helped with all of the legal aspects of starting our new company, as well as business negotiations with other companies. They have gone above and beyond to make sure that we always receive fast and reliable professional legal advice. They are genuine and trustworthy. We will continue to choose this firm to represent our company indefinitely!

I was having issues getting my children's portion of my late husband's life insurance.  Manley & Brautigam was recommended to me.  I met with Peter and Sandon.  They instantly got on the job and within a few months after a year of dealing with the insurance company I finally received the checks in the mail.  With out their help they probably still wouldn't have their money.

I went to law offices of Robert Hertz with a Federal case . I asked him to look it over he explained my situation . It was bleek . Looking at a 10 year sentence.  My public defender was wanting me to sign a 10 year plea agreement. He took my case and was able to negotiate my sentence  down to 2 years and gave me time to get my affairs in order . His knowledge and and understanding of Federal law is amazing  . Best decision  I ever made hiring  him to defend me .

If you are reading this review it is very likely you or a loved one has found themselves in very precarious position with the law. What I can tell you is look no further. Robert is extremely knowledgeable, creative, a strategic thinker, and understanding when it comes to navigating the stressful process of criminal proceedings. In my experience there are attorney's who answer questions with "let me look into that" and attorney's who answer questions with context, case law examples, examples of exceptions, and references of statutes. Robert is the latter and he does so humbly. He has an exceptional mind and he truly cares for his clients, I cannot recommend Robert enough. Thank you Robert, you gave my family a much needed victory. I am forever grateful.

I contacted Robert because of his outstanding reviews online and professional appearance. Let me tell you from the very start Robert was very professional, Resourceful, and never let up once during the entire investigation. I was unfortunately being investigated for serious charges that had absolutely no merit. I only needed to make one phone call, and that was to Robert. Robert and his team conducted a thorough investigation, built a solid defense, and left absolutely no doubt in the investigation. Robert always kept me updated on the investigation process and always spent the time needed before court. In the end, the truth came out, and I was not only cleared of all accusations alleged against me. I was put in a most favorable light by the court. If you need an excellent lawyer and one that is going to go the extra mile for you with professional work, Robert is your only call.

One of the worst experiences ever. I was working with both Leanne and Kael. Apparently Leanne was selling her practice to Kael and I didn’t know that I thought they worked together but talking between 2 people about one case was ridiculous. Kael did absolutely nothing for me and charged me 5500$ and didn’t do anything for me. At the time of my hearing I was sitting right behind him and he didn’t know I was there. He started reading off my sentence and was totally the wrong sentencing, the prosecutor had to correct him at which time he laughed it off. Complete neglegence. Unprofessional. I’d be in the same boat I’m in if I never even hired them. What a waste of money. Do not use Kael. Horrible.

I consulted every lawyer in town for my case, not only was Kael the most confident and knowledgeable, but his pricing was fair and competitive. I was facing a possesion charge as well as an oui and open container charge. Kael was able to get all my charges dismissed before my job ever found out.
leigh ann bauer is a must go to attourney i highly recommend if your stressing to choose an attourney for dui charge. she is the best

reviews.text: She was amazing her whole team was.. Fought for me on the most Unpredictable circumstances… She is rough around the edges, but it’s because she very much cares about what she’s doing.. Her staff performed a miracle with my care and I’ll be forever grateful… Highly recommend her
