reviews.text: Leigh Ann is extremely unprofessional and rude. She talked over me and belittled me almost every phone call. Her and her team were no help and a huge waste of money. I believe the 5 star reviews are fake. Please don’t fall into the trap of this operation taking money from people going through a hard vulnerable time.
reviews.ownerResponse:
You are not being truthful. You wanted to be your own lawyer, so I was terminated from representing you. You need to own what you did or didn't do with your own case.

Abraham Lincoln put this best,

"The man who represents himself has a fool for a client."

reviews.text: Leigh Ann and her team always fight for the best outcome and were very helpful with helping me take the right steps through my OUI case I would recommend her services to anyone that’s looking for good representation in there case
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your kind words! We are appreciative of your trust in our firm and were happy to help.

Unfortunately, federal law could dictate bad things and that is not something that we have any control over, federal law governs many situations and that is outside of anybody's control. Unfortunately, federal law will take precedence over state cases, and there is nothing any attorney in a state case can do to trump a federal matter. We wish you the best moving forward.

You must have me confused with another law office. I have no record of you calling our office, I have never met with you, nor are you a client. You never left any feedback on what our office can do to improve or what we did wrong. We researched your name and found nothing but blank accounts leading us to believe that you are a bot or troll.

reviews.text: I was on vacation when I ran in to trouble. Googled and  her office was the only one that answered. I’ve ran in to trouble other times and spent thousands leading me to believe all lawyers are liars until I met Leigh Ann. She’s professional, lets you know what to expect and lets you know what she will focus on doing for your best possible outcome. No promises, but you feel reassured she will do her best for you..By the way her fees are incredibly reasonable and she works with you to save you money. Her team of paralegals keeps you up to date on your case and anything pending.Miraculously thanks to her , my case was dismissed otherwise I’d be serving time in Alaska very far from home. Even after my case was closed , she and her team reached out to find out if I needed help with any other paperwork in my home town. I highly recommend her. If you want the best outcome choose Leigh Ann as your representative.

Leigh Ann is easily the worst person and definitely the worst lawyer I have ever met. My father hired her for my second DUI in February of 2020 and it has been a nightmare to work with her since then. She acts as if doing anything her job requires is a huge hassle and makes sure you know "how much effort she is putting in", without ever actually showing proof of any of it. Initially, I did not want to go to Seattle for "treatment" because I knew I didn't need it. Liz, her paralegal/secretary then instructed me to just go to a different program and not tell Leigh Ann about it. I did that and graduated. Received no recognitiion from Leigh Ann or the court, nor did they ever ask for any proof of it. So it was pointless. I was also on house arrest for almost all of 2020, with Leigh Ann not trying to get me off of it once, no matter how many times I asked, and ended up not receiving credit for any of it because she refused to argue my case. I ended up getting in trouble again in February of this year unfortunately, due to my mental health issues, which Leigh Ann and the entire court were more than aware of, and all I got in return was Leigh Ann compeltely quitting as my lawyer and taking all of my money with her, not ever showing me any proof of what she had actually done as my lawyer in the LAST YEAR. She did not quit due to me having issues; she quit because I asked for evidence that she had argued my case. I have several voice recordings of her screaming at me and calling me names, as well as many emails including her lack of professionalism and downright rudeness. This is not how you treat people, much less clients who are paying you. I have already started my complaint to the bar.

All of this being said, based on her reviews, you can definitely tell she picks favorite clients who she actually wants to help and those that she doesn't. Which is why she receives either 5 or 1 star. So hey, if you want to waste $10,000 in hopes that you will be one she'll actually like and do her job for, go for it. But I wouldn't risk it. I now have a public defender who is doing 10 times more than she ever did and actually keeping me updated on what is going on with my case. Who would have thought that someone provided from the state  would be more helpful than an attorney? It's because they actually have something to prove; she doesn't. Leigh Ann and her office don't care about you as a person or a client. Look somewhere else.

UPDATE: I now have a public defender who actually communicates with me and is helping me stay out of jail. Leigh Ann never did this. She was going to let me rot in jail for months. Also, he is getting me credit for being on house arrest March-August of last year when Leigh Ann refused to even try.

In regards to her comments, well, you can see how she always has an excuse for people who are unhappy with her service.

Update in 2024: I have now graduated from a wellness court program and have been sober for several years. I still feel the same way about Leigh Ann Bauer. She chooses to represent some people well and others her team chooses to throw away. I’m still upset that my father paid her $10,000 to verbally abuse and belittle me for having alcohol issues and trying to seek help and representation.
reviews.ownerResponse:
This is completely untrue. This a retaliatory post from a former client, who is upset with her current self-imposed legal situation. The Professional Rules of Conduct, prohibit me from commenting on this post. We will use the client's own words to portray the truth.

1. "My father hired her for my second DUI in February 2020"
2. "I was not the easiest client to work for, because I didn't want to go to Seatle for "treatment" because I didn't need it"
3. "I was on house arrest for almost all of 2020"
4. "I ended up getting into trouble again in February of this year"

This client was treated with respect by myself and my staff, even when she did not reciprocate. We were available to her 24/7 and wish this client nothing but the best.

UPDATE: Since you have self-identified yourself, we encourage any concerned reader to look on courtview and learn for themselves that this person is unable to tell the truth.

Leigh Ann help me keep my license for a few months, house arrest, even tho that depend on your background🙄,got my probation knock down a year and got my sentence knock down by a day. But to be honest when it comes down to it, she an average lawyer. Look into a public defender before spending thousands of dollars on her, you probably get the same results regarding a DUI if the evidence is heavy on you. If you are trying to get your conviction knock down to reckless driving, try another lawyer. Terminology she use on me "March your little butt to jail"  " if there better lawyers then hire them" extremely rude and always interrupted me when I talk. Be careful guys, these lawyers get paid regardless if your convicted or not.......so some lawyers might not care.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Mr. Roney, for your valued feedback. You’re right, there are many defense attorneys to choose from and we’re grateful for every client that selects our office to help them with their case. Ms. Bauer’s job is to examine every minute of a case and locate legal defenses. Admittedly and regretfully, we’ve had many cases that do not provide us with circumstances that allow for a dismissal or reduction and unfortunately that is not something that can be predicted prior to “spending thousands” on an attorney. Our office works diligently for the dismissals and reductions that we do get every single month. Furthermore, our office has set limits for what cases we take and cities we take cases, so that we are able to give each client careful attention and walk them through every step of the process, especially if there is no dismissal or reduction. Ms. Bauer would never say “march your little butt to jail”. She has tremendous respect for the penalties our clients suffer though. Part of assisting a client through a conviction is getting electronic monitoring set up so they can do their jail time at home rather than jail, so to make such a casual and insulting comment about a penalty that is taken very seriously is implausible for a defense attorney of 30 years.

reviews.text: I would like to commend this law office with doing such an amazing job in my case, communication was great and they always had an answer to every question I had to ask, and when I was unsure about something I would call and someone would always be there to reassure me with anything needed. I thank you again Leigh Ann and your awesome team for all you’ve done for me.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your review. It was out pleasure to help you, and we all appreciated your kind words!

reviews.text: Leigh Ann efficiently and professionally expunged some negative records from my file. I highly recommend her services!

reviews.text: Leigh Ann did work a miracle on my behalf. Leigh Ann herself was a great person overall, she is quite busy and wasn’t able to communicate directly with her often, but the end result was worth the money. My only issue was communication with her assistant wasn’t so great, sometimes even rude, but Leigh Ann always seemed to be able to smooth that out. If you look at all the poor reviews and the responses, you can pretty much see the attitude of Leigh Ann.  I believe some of her responses breach the ethics of Attorney client privilege and  Alaska Rules of Professional Conduct.  I have screen shot all of them and are submitting them to the Board of Bar Overseers along with my own personal observations of ethic violations I feel have transpired.  I encourage you to also file a report if you feel your rights or confidentiality have been compromised.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi Buddy Gold,
There is a vast difference between my good and bad reviews. My 1-Stars tend to be left by disgruntled former clients that had unrealistic expectations. My other reviews speak for themselves. I appreciate your advocacy for attorney ethics, I’ve been practicing criminal defense for over 30 years and am proud to affirm no violations.

reviews.text: I was recommended Leigh Ann Bauer, and I'm very glad I called her. She was able to get my whole case dismissed, it took some time but it was well worth the wait! Don't hesitate to call the office and see what they can do for you. 10/10 Highly Recommend.

Leigh Ann and her staff were very professional, great to work with and was interested in seeing and telling my side of the story. If I ever need another lawyer in the future (which I hope I don't) Leigh Ann would be my first call.

Leigh Ann, Liz, & rest of the crew. Man I wish I can give these guys 10 stars. Leigh Ann fought really hard for my case which I was accused for a OUI. It was a process but Leigh Ann kept me informed on everything. This went to from being accused for a OUI, to the case bing dismissed. Thank you again Leigh Ann and crew, I highly recommend hiring them.

Thanks

reviews.text: I highly recommend Attorney Bauer for legal representation. Both Leigh Ann and her staff are professional and do everything in their power to fight for the client's desired outcome. I would just like to thank Lean Bauer and her team for there hard work in helping me get not one but two DUI charges dropped. The first one was a few years back and just recently they pulled through for me once again. I wouldn’t call on anyone else for legal assistance because they never hesitate when it comes to having my back and they’re just flat out good at what they do.Period. Thanks again and keep up the great work!!!!

Pretty much I got a DUI and Leigh Ann Bauer got it Dismissed. Very big thank you to her and her whole staff who helped. I had no idea this firm existed actually some one recommended her to me and I called her right away. Best decision I ever made. Now I will fersher recommend her to whoever would need her in the future, no doubt in that.

I was unhappy with the service I received from Leigh Ann Bauer’s office and eventually switched to a different attorney who did a much better job.

I retained Leigh Ann Bauer to represent me regarding a DUI charge in 2018. The initial phone interview with Leigh Ann went well, and the online reviews of her office looked good. I paid her office the $3,600 flat-rate fee for DUI representation.

The first sign of trouble was a slowness in responding to emails. I had a few questions about the citations that I received during the traffic stop. Several times I found myself sending additional follow-up emails to the office after not hearing anything back for three to four days.

The next issue I ran into was Leigh Ann’s office refusing to handle my citations. I received some citations along with my DUI charge when I got pulled over - speeding and a couple others. Leigh Ann’s office informed me that they could not help me with those because they don’t deal with citations, only criminal charges. They suggested that I contact the city prosecutor to request that the citations be consolidated with my criminal case.
I called the Fairbanks District Attorney’s office. The person I talked with there said that they could not speak with about the citations because I was already represented by a lawyer. She also said that normally the defendant's attorney would submit the request to get a citation consolidated in with the criminal case. In the long run, during the hearing for the citations, the judge at the Nenana courthouse assigned the citations to be addressed with the criminal case, saying, “dealing with the citations separately from the criminal case would be pretty unusual”.

At some point the paralegal left the company. She had been my main point of contact and was the one who was familiar with my case. I think it was a few weeks before a new one came in.

Earlier this spring I had a phone appointment scheduled with Leigh Ann to talk about my case. She called me 4 or 5 days prior to the appointment instead. During our impromptu phone call, Leigh Ann mentioned something about the prosecuting attorney bugging her regarding my case. She said the attorney has offered a deal and we need to "pull the trigger" on it soon. Leigh Ann was speaking quickly and not very thoroughly - as if I knew a lot about the case and a lot about the court system’s processes. I had to ask her quite a few simple questions in order to understand what was going on. Eventually Leigh Ann suggested that I plead guilty to the DUI charge. She said the prosecuting attorney would then waive the breath test refusal charge.

At this point I reached out to a different attorney. He explained things clearly and concisely and brought up a few options that Leigh Ann had not mentioned. Rather quickly he was able to get my charge reduced to reckless driving and his fee was quite a bit less than the $3,600 I paid to Leigh Ann’s office.

Given my experience, I would not recommend using the services of Leigh Ann Bauer’s office.
reviews.ownerResponse:
I am so happy that you were able to get a reckless driving reduction. My ultimate goal is to be able to negotiate a reduced sentence for all my clients. I remember your case very well; I was in the middle of very intensive negotiations with the District Attorney’s office on your behalf. I was in the process of pushing your case to trial with the anticipation of getting a reckless driving reduction. I am so glad that your new attorney was able to benefit from my groundwork.
Every attorney has a different negotiating style. I am very direct with my clients, always being honest and letting them know the worst-case/best-case scenario, especially when a client is facing multiple criminal charges. When a client is facing more than one charge and they do not want to accept the State’s offer, the District Attorney can withdraw the offer to dismiss additional counts and that decision can cause significant legal risks.
It is my personal style to speak directly with my clients rather than emailing back and forth after all the discovery has been received and reviewed. This way I can address any and all questions they may have. Our office returns phone call and emails within 24 hours of receipt. You and I spent many hours on the phone discussing your case. You were very uncomfortable with pushing this case to trial or “pulling the trigger” as you stated. You are not being truthful when you state that I advised you to accept the State's offer. Your approach in handling this case was more passive than mine and in my professional opinion, would have gotten us nowhere. I am a trial lawyer and pushing cases to trial or “pulling the trigger” to signal to the District Attorney that we are serious about a charge reduction and will do whatever it takes to get one is what good trial lawyers do for their clients. This approach has benefited numerous clients and I have obtained many reduced charges and dismissals.
Our office has never handled client's citations. You were told this before I was retained. The DA's will not agree to dismiss the citations either, because they handle only criminal matters and not traffic cases.
I am glad that you were able to hire another attorney that matched your personality better. I wish you the best of luck.

reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Lesley! Thank you for taking the time to share your concerns. I’m very sorry to hear you had a negative experience — that is not the standard of service we strive to provide. Unless there is some kind of finding of domestic violence by a court of law, then when an attorney withdraws, per the Alaska Rules of Professional Conduct, specifically Rule 81, "the attorney shall certify to the court that the attorney has complied with the requirements for service of the motion and shall provide the court with the party’s last known address, telephone number, and email address."  It's actually part of the rules of professional conduct to provide a party's contact information to the court, including phone number, address, and email! Regarding your concerns about making up "ridiculous bills," I would be happy to address each billing statement with you and explain the way we carefully document billing at the firm.

I had the opportunity to work with Michael Chicklo on a legal matter outside of his normal caseload, and I can’t say enough good things about the way he handled it.

He took the time to listen, gave clear and honest guidance, and explained everything in a way that actually made sense. His advice was practical, direct, and clearly came from real experience—not guesswork.

What stood out most was his integrity. He helped me without charging anything, simply because he wanted to make sure I was pointed in the right direction. That says a lot about his character and professionalism.

If you’re looking for an attorney who knows what he’s doing, communicates clearly, and genuinely cares about helping people—not just billing hours—I’d absolutely recommend Michael Chicklo!

Chiklo facility: they have small refrigerators that are supplied with Alani energy drinks. As an Army EOD veteran, I know good taste when I see it. The fact that they have Alanis tells me everything I need to know.

Personnel: Megan and Farren will put in WORK, and they will make you work too. They will take the time to really understand what your situation is and they will make sure you have realistic expectations. I am incredibly grateful to work with these two.

I am incredibly grateful to Megan, Farren, and the entire Chicklo team for their compassion and for being my voice when mine went unheard. Their professionalism and open communication throughout the process were instrumental, and I felt supported every step of the way. I was particularly impressed by Megan's thorough preparation, strategic approach, and solid understanding of the facts, all of which enhanced her ability to present compelling arguments in the courtroom. I highly recommend them for anyone in need of legal representation.

Five stars are simply not enough for Marc Chicklo and his entire team.

I am a foreigner who immigrated to the United States after marrying an active-duty U.S. Air Force member. As an immigrant and a non-native English speaker, I was in a very vulnerable position. After years of repeated infidelity, emotional abuse, constant lies, manipulation, complete lack of emotional support, and ongoing threats from my husband, I realized I could not protect myself on my own. Facing an American citizen who was also in the military felt terrifying, especially in a country where I did not fully understand the legal system or speak perfect English.

Hiring Marc was not just a legal decision - it was a matter of survival.

Throughout this long journey of more than a year and a half, Marc and his entire team were consistently exceptional in both legal expertise and human compassion. Marc is extremely knowledgeable, strategic, and strong as an attorney. He understood the legal complexities of my situation, explained everything clearly, and made sure I was never taken advantage of. At the same time, he never treated me like just a case file or a transaction.

When I was emotionally exhausted, scared, and close to breaking down, Marc and his team - including his incredible paralegals - were always there. They answered my questions patiently, reassured me when I felt overwhelmed, and treated me with genuine kindness and respect. They helped me stand my ground when I felt too weak to do so myself.

Marc and his team stood beside me so that my ex-husband could no longer intimidate, threaten, or emotionally harm me. Because of them, I was able to finally escape a painful marriage and close a chapter that lasted more than ten years. The divorce process itself was extremely painful, but I honestly believe that without Marc, it would have been far more traumatic and frightening.

Although I was just one of many clients, Marc and his team made me feel protected, heard, and supported every step of the way. Their professionalism and their humanity are equally outstanding.

If you are an immigrant, a foreigner, or someone married to a U.S. military member and you are suffering from abuse, fear, or power imbalance, please know that you are not alone. I sincerely encourage you to reach out to Marc Chicklo. He is someone you can truly trust in one of the hardest moments of your life.

From the bottom of my heart, thank you to Marc and his entire team for helping me survive, stay strong, and begin a new chapter of my life.

reviews.ownerResponse: We often talk about how great our business model is. We can give our clients the best, white-glove treatment, And it only puts MORE Money in their pocket. Every other attorney and staff that does not practice contingency fee (like we do) has to charge for every phone call, every letter, Every meeting, every pleading. So, when they do hard work for you, the work is good, but it costs you money. But with a good personal injury firm, the hard work means that the case is resolved for more money-Which means that YOU get more money. Many of our lawyers have worked on the defense side, or in other areas of law, Where we had to keep up with every minute that we spent on our clients’ cases and charge them hundreds of dollars an hour for it. Here, no matter how much time we spend on your case, we do not charge you by the hour. The only way that we get more money is if we get the insurance company to pay more money. We truly love this business model, and the way that it allows us to lavish our clients with time and still help their bottom line. Thank you so much for the review!!

But, Crowson worked all the issues,  followed my recovery, and took 100% care of any/all issues related to the accident and documented medical recovery. They followed up with me often. We were not experienced with all the issues, frustrated, and stressed until We went to Crowson.  We could not have covered the significant cost of medical. I live in another state went out on good faith that this was the company to do it I WAS WRONG!!! It took almost two years to get into court than Brian said he was having trouble getting my divorce decree from Hawaii so I called paid out of my pocket to have it certified mailed to me so I could mail it to him. Made several copies of various paperwork again copied paid out of my pocket and mailed to Brian. Could not ever get Brian to return my calls and when it came time for court I showed up in Alaska from North Carolina. NOW LISTEN!!!! When we got to court he was "rubbing elbows" with the other parties Lawyer and Brian did not have hardly any paperwork to defend my case. The Judge gave all rights to the other party YES I LOST COSTUDY OF MY DAUGHTER!!! And Brian sent me a bill for another $3000.00 If you read this RUN DO NOT CALL THIS COMPANY. One last thing My Daughter was born in another country so the other party asked how to go about the adoption Brian my Lawyer stood up in the court room and told the Judge that he would be more than happy to assist he knows how. So long story short if you have $8000.00 laying around and you want to lose custody of you child than call Brian Heady at the Law offices of Dattan Scott Dattan!!!!!

reviews.text:
In 2017 I suffered from a debilitating, life changing injury. For over a year I struggled, (unrepresented) with not only recovery and supporting myself, but supporting my child as well.  Eventually we were displaced by my circumstances surrounding my personal injury and I became desperate for guidance.

One evening I googled “personal injury attorneys in Alaska”, filled out a generic form online and was contacted by the Libbey Law Firm within a few hours. I explained my injury, my anxiety and the ignorance I had for my rights, but was quickly relieved of the stress I was undergoing.

Dan & Colleen Libbey, Les Syren, Michelle and Maria have been a God-Send. From the legal representation to emotional support during the most trying time in my life, I was treated with the utmost respect and my concerns were handled with care. This team is extremely dedicated to their clients well-being and have gone above and beyond the typical scope of practice to provide an Elite level of representation. (Talk about Raising the Bar) The process took what felt like decades, (a few years) and there were times that I lost momentum and even became too busy dealing with personal issues to respond in a timely manner. Despite my lack of participation at times, the Libbey Law Firm consistently catered to my interests and aggressively negotiated  on my behalf.

The level of compassion and care they show their clients is unmatched. The fact that they are a family really complimented their capabilities  and I cannot adequately express my gratitude for the way they diligently handled my case!

I would (and have) recommend this law firm to anyone needing legal representation and will definitely retain their services if required in the future. Thank you all for your hard work!

Meleanna
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Meleanna. It was our privilege to represent you, and we enjoyed working with you.

They helped set me up with imagining and a new chiropractor. Colleen and Michelle were always there if I needed anything. Their words of encouragement will never be forgotten. You’re not just another client to them. I HIGHLY recommend Libbey Law Offices!

My experience with Marisa Chud and her assistant Mary couldn't be more opposite from my first experience. For the first time in seven years, I felt heard. I didn't just have a lawyer, I had an advocate who was straightforward and compassionate. I couldn't recommend Marisa and Mary highly enough. They were wonderful and I was blessed to have them all my legal team.

Without getting too much into the details of my case, it was uphill, challenging, and incredibly stressful. The paralegal, Mary, was incredibly empathetic, supportive, organized, and thorough, and always returned my calls and emails quickly. Jon-Marc was also so very supportive, methodical in his approach, was quick to manage curveballs that came our way, and did a fantastic job advocating for me in court. They were always honest and direct with me. We had a challenging case but the end result was in my favor as a result of their diligence. The firm was also accommodating of my needs and receptive to my requests. I'm thrilled with the service provided and can move forward in my life stress-free.

They listened, answered my questions, and let me know what to expect throughout the process. If you need an attorney, they are the best. Mary Almeida, paralegal, was also an integral part of my legal team. She was professional, detailed, compassionate, and a fierce advocate to have on your team. She answered every call and email promptly, answered my questions thoroughly, and provided support and encouragement when the situation seemed overwhelming. Mary also kept me well-informed about all costs related to my account's expenses. I appreciated how much careful consideration went into trying to keep the costs/fees to me reasonable. Jon-Marc, Marisa, Mary, and every other staff member I encountered treated me with respect and kindness in every interaction. They did an excellent job, and I highly recommend Denali Law Group.

reviews.text:
If you have injuries from an auto accident, I highly recommend working with Mr. Schlehofer and his team right away. I’d never been in a car crash or had injuries before and naively assumed the other person’s insurance company would just do the right thing and pay for my necessary treatment. They did not, and I ended up needing someone to advocate for me.
I am so glad I chose Mr. Schlehofer and his team – everyone was professional, kind and helpful navigating the maze of paperwork. The process was long, yet successful, and Jerad (a team member) was incredibly helpful. The settlement Mr. Schlehofer negotiated included all past medical bills and a sum that will allow me to pay for future needs. I was impressed and so very grateful. Had I not had his help, I would have paid out of pocket many thousands of dollars. I highly recommend Mr. Schlehofer to anyone needing a personal injury attorney. (And even if you’re not sure you need an attorney, call him and ask for guidance. You’d be amazed how much seemingly “simple” injuries end up costing you in pain, time and medical bills. An attorney makes all the difference) I’m very thankful for Mr. Schlehofer and his expertise.

Working with Curt Martin and his team was truly a pleasure. Curt is exactly the kind of attorney you want on your side. He is compassionate, informative, and thoughtful, while also being a true pit bull when it comes to advocating for his clients. He does not hold back and works aggressively to achieve the best possible outcome.
I highly recommend this law office. Curt and his team know how to get the job done!

“I have known Curt for several years both socially and professionally.  He has always been helpful and friendly in all my dealings with him.  He is forthright in his professional advice, giving clear assessments of the facts, allowing for good decisions to be made. I would have no hesitation recommending him to someone needing his expertise.”

“In the Fall of 2019, Spring of 2020 we found ourselves needing to find an attorney.  Our nightmare began in July of 2019 when tragedy struck, and our 18-year-old son was killed in a car crash.  We thought everything would work through the process and what should happen would happen.  Sadly, that is very far from what happens.  So, we needed to obtain an attorney.  We live in a small community and with processing our grief we didn't have much left of ourselves to find and commute back and forth working with an attorney in Anchorage, or wherever we could find the best.  By the grace of God, Curt entered our world.  And he was right here in Palmer, 3 miles from our house.  We did not have the mental strength to do everything that needed to be done, but he did.   We met with Curt, and he was so caring, so knowledgeable.  He did not leave a single I undotted or a t not crossed.  He was kind, gentle and in full support and justice for the loss of our son and what we were going through and what we needed. The best thing we could have ever done was listen to the advice we received when I was told, "call him, just call him", meaning Curt. Bottom line, we were treated with the highest respect and kindness, but most of all, our son was honored and represented at the very highest degree. Thank you not just to Curt, but his entire staff.  I wish we never needed the services of Curt Martin, but we did.  And we truly were represented by the best.”

I had a fantastic and very professional experience working with Curt. Curt explained everything to me in both legal and layman terms, so I never felt in the dark. I always understood what was going on, and what was to be expected every step of the way. This was my first experience needing legal representation and I feel blessed that Curt was representing me. I’ve heard that a lot of people don’t have such great experiences with attorneys, especially when it’s their first time being represented. I still have Curts’ card in my wallet, because if anything were to ever happen where I would need representation for personal injury or otherwise, I know I could call Curt, and he would point me in the right direction.”

Dealt with hundreds of lawyers. over 50 years of business and life. I have only known two Lawyers that are worth their salt.  You cannot Rob Honor and you cannot steal Glory. reviews.text:
I have had the privilege of knowing Blake Fulton Quackenbush for about five years, both professionally and within our community, and I can say without hesitation that he is the kind of attorney — and person — you want in your corner.

Blake is a devoted family man and a true pillar of our community. He leads with integrity, empathy, and an unwavering commitment to doing what’s right. If you’ve ever met Blake, you know his smile is genuine — but behind it is someone who takes deep pride in enriching the lives of the people around him. He goes out of his way to recognize, uplift, and celebrate others, creating a culture of trust and belonging that’s rare to find.

What sets Blake apart is his willingness to stand up and be a voice for those who need one most. He doesn’t shy away from tough situations or hard conversations. He listens. He cares. And he advocates with conviction. That combination of compassion and strength is exactly what you want when navigating legal challenges.

As a business owner, veteran, and lifelong Alaskan who works with professionals across many industries, I don’t offer praise lightly. Blake has earned it. His character, leadership, and dedication to service are reflected not only in his practice, but in the positive impact he has on our community every day.

If you’re looking for legal representation rooted in trust, professionalism, and genuine care for people — not just cases — I wholeheartedly recommend the Law Offices of Blake Fulton Quackenbush.

Ten years ago, my husband and I decided to move our assets into a trust. We had the privilege of working with Richard Foley before he retired. The first iteration was well-organized and has stood the test of time well, although a few updates have been needed over the years.
Since then, we've worked with Melanie Iverson and Emil Betro. The updates were seamless and completed per our wishes. Too often today, trying to reach some people in business has turned into a test of trying to work through a chatbot or phone tree. Not with Foley Pearson Riekkola Iverson! Calls and emails are responded to almost immediately, and questions are answered. This reduces a lot of anxiety and concerns that surface when dealing with such an important aspect of life. We have greatly appreciated the work they’ve done on our behalf.
Cherie Northon and Thom Eley
We needed an Estate Planner and were recommended to Foley and Pearson - great choice! They are clear in explaining the process and answer any questions. Highly recommend!

Staff was a genuine pleasure to work with from the start of planning and offered us very wise legal advice as well as a high quality estate planning package.  Highly recommend.  Zero complaints.

Very knowledgeable and professional attorneys and staff.  They deliver their services at a level that provides great peace of mind.  I would highly recommend them for any estate planning and maintenance.

My husband and I adopted a child with disabilities 23 years ago. Foley and Foley led us all the way since then in developing and keeping current a living trust. We have been treated with kindness and professionalism all these years.

My wife and I had a Trust set up through Foley and Pearson. The original work was clear and understandable, as well as a review and modification we had handled. All interactions were professional and friendly. Communications were excellent all through the process.

Chelsea was very helpful in getting my estate plan ready to go. She worked with me to get it all organized and I ended up with a packet that is easily understood! Her understanding of the estate services available outside Foley Peterson (at the time) that would be helpful for me were much appreciated.

Chelsea Riekkola is a fantastic, grounded attorney who always fights for the best interest for her clients. She is easy to talk to, personable, and is all around super-great. As I have my own estate through their team, plus she's had to help me close out the estate of both parents, I can highly recommend them to help you with your estate issues.
Bill Pearson and the team have been professional.  Top notch service throughout the process.
Chelsea Riekkola was wonderful to speak with. She was very informative and gave me all the information I needed. I would highly recommend obtaining her services.
Great, friendly and professional service.

Be careful if you are setting up a Living Trust with them.  Make sure you understand what you are paying for.  My parents set up a Living Trust.  They thought Foley and Pearson would be very helpful once they past away.  The Living Trust was helpful but the attorney was not.  He wanted $10,000 to go over the trust with us.  I explained we did not have any money left so he thought he could bring it down to $5,000.  I had to hire a different lawyer and it took less than 30 minutes to go over the Living Trust with us.  Costed me $150.  I was very disappointed.
Wonderful organization! Outstanding Staff!
Excellent organization, reasonable timelines, fair pricing. I am so happy with my experience.
excellent service at what I thought was a reasonable price.  Also very professional in every way!

Unfortunately I had a several poor experiences with this firm. The staff was not concerned with my needs or my questions.  Following directions and completing tasks in a timely manner was difficult for them. Getting important information to the correct  location did not happen. I had difficulty getting my phone calls and emails returned. If It had been up to me I would chose another company to handle my affairs. I would want to know my loved ones were taken care of better than this after I passed.
Chelsea was absolutely awesome all through our family trust process. She made an otherwise challenging task understandable and smooth. Thank you very much!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your kind words! We are glad you had a good experience.

reviews.text: Set up our Living Trust in 2006 and just updated with the help of Bill Pearson.  He provided great advice and worked directly with our financial advisor to get our Trust updated to reflect 2023 realities.  Very professional, timely and made a difficult task alot easier.
Great law firm, knowledgeable in estate planning, trust, and probate work. Great people to work with.
Great people to work with.
From the time of my first call for my mom's Estate to first meeting my Attorney I am very satisfied.

When you need an estate planning attorney here in Alaska, Chelsea Riekkola with Foley & Pearson is the one you want in your corner. Chelsea and her team were a dream to work with as we planned our estate. They were beyond knowledgeable, communication was top notch, and they took all of our concerns seriously. We are now set up and have peace of mind knowing that no matter what happens in life, our legacy is protected.

Our family worked with Foley & Pearson to develop our estate plan.  They did a thorough job and, while we’re due to update some things, it is nice to know that if misfortune occurs our children’s needs will be addressed.

We have had our living trust with  Foley & Foley / Foley & Pearson since 2003. The staff is efficient and helpful. They answered all our "what if....." questions. Chelsea  is abound with energy. We feel very satisfied and fortunate to have our living trust with  Foley & Pearson.

We are very appreciative of the advice, consultation and the preparation of our Living Trust with the guidance from Foley & Pearson.  Our mission almost 20 years ago (January of 2003) was to assure that we had an estate plan and Living Trust to assure the transition of our estate to our benefactors after our death.  The assistance of the Foley & Foley staff (now Foley & Pearson) was critical in this process.  Chelsea Ray Riekkola was instrumental in her guidance and development and continued maintenance of our Living Trust.

We became clients of (then) Foley & Foley about twenty years ago when we became a mixed family with shared custody.  Even though parental relationships were good, there were many details to consider and we benefited greatly from the knowledge and services we recieved in establishing our estate plan. Throughout the years, as our circumstances evolved, we have been even more grateful for excellent guidance we regularly recieve from (now) Foley & Pearson.  Of particular distinction is their ability to engage the whole family in sessions so questions and expectations are clarified for everyone in a comfortable environment.  We highly recommend Foley & Pearson for anyone considered estate planning, even if you think all you need is a simple will!

These are great people and provide an excellent product. I was never so happy as to complete a trust with Foley and Pearson. And to this day, I have never regretted engaging this firm to get my trust done. More should do the same.
We initially set up our trust with Foley & Pearson (Foley & Foley) in 2000.  We have always been happy with the advice and service received from this firm and their helpful staff.
F&P made a scary and complicated topic easy to understand. Chelsea and Alex were great to work with. I was very happy with the end product.
We have had our Living Trust with Foley & Pearson for years. They have been very professional, organized and thorough.
Great folks. Easy to work with.
Experienced and professional!

My wife and I have been with Foley and Foley and, now, Foley and Pearson for a long while now.  They have provided us with nothing except exceptional service.  We knew basically nothing about wills, trusts, and other such things.  The staff patiently explained them to us and their advice was instrumental in developing our trust.  We recommend Foley and Pearson to everyone.

Thom Eley and Cherie Northon
Very knowledgable firm. Annual updates are easy using their Generations program.

My husband and I engaged the services of Foley & Pearson to prepare a living trust, update our will, and prepare other essential documents. We found the firm to be thorough, professional, and responsive to our individual needs and our requests. They handled all the financial and legal aspects and made certain we understood the conditions. Particular kudos to Melanie and Alex, who became more than just advisors. I highly recommend Foley & Pearson for estate planning.
Friendly and most helpful staff
Good place to have a Will done!

Our Estate Plan was created and completed by Foley Foley and Pearson.  From the beginning and thru completion they were professional, timely, positive and thorough.  Mr. Pearson and his staff was effective in communicating the estate planning process and necessary documentation.  We are completely satisfied with the results and highly recommend them to all of our friends and family.

Chelsea did an outstanding job of preparing a new will, POA, living will and more, demonstrating the highest degree of professionalism, patience, and understanding I have encountered in many years.  I recommend Chelsea and this firm unconditionally for all aspects of estate planning.  DocBob, PhD, Cdr USN (ret)

Taylor Rose Thompson, Esquire, is an elite world class superstar. She is the best of the best!
Taylor and her staff go above and beyond expectations. I give Taylor and her staff my highest recommendation for anyone needing an attorney.

I couldn’t have asked for a better attorney. Taylor was patient, easy to work with, and always kept me informed. She explained all my options and guided me through each step with so much care. Truly amazing!

Thompson Law Group provided outstanding service from start to finish. They were professional, responsive, and genuinely cared about my case. Every question I had was answered quickly, and I always felt informed and supported throughout the process. Their team went above and beyond to achieve a great outcome. I highly recommend Thompson Law Group to anyone looking for dependable and knowledgeable legal representation.

These people are amazing! The girls at the front were prompt, friendly, and kind. They really know their stuff! Taylor is NOT like your typical lawyer. Her way in the courtroom is remarkable! She has a way of being tactful and classy while fighting hard for the truth to come out! She always stood by our side with compassion and professionalism. She was extremely patient with us. Her knowledge of family law and her dedication gave us confidence during one of the hardest times of our life. I am beyond grateful for all she has done and would recommend her to anyone needing a strong, supportive, and trustworthy family lawyer.

Thompson Law Group is a strong professional legal team that truly & genuinely cares about their clients and will fight for your best interests, I highly recommend Thompson Law Group! Great family attorneys!!!

She’s not only a true professional but she’s also warm and considerate. We are so thankful that she came into our lives, we  would recommend her as an attorney until the end of time!!
Thank you Taylor Thompson. You made our life better.
God Bless you today and always.

reviews.text: I was looking for a lawyer and came across Taylor. She was very well recommended by many! She is a go them kick butt lawyer. she will fight for you, and go the extra mile. I can’t be more at ease having her fight for me! She is worth every penny! I can’t thank her enough!
Thompson Law Group answered all my questions with great clarity and patience. He kept me informed every step of the way, which gave me great peace of mind. I am very grateful!!!!

I cannot thank Taylor and her incredible team enough for the support and care they provided during one of the hardest times in my life. From the very first meeting, they gave me a safe and judgment-free space to share my experiences and concerns. Taylor helped me navigate the complexities of my case, explaining every step of the process and preparing me for court in a way that eased my fears.

What stood out the most was the kindness and compassion they showed, especially during emotional moments. I cried often, and they never made me feel anything but supported.

Taylor’s team also worked with me on a payment plan, showing so much understanding when I had financial difficulties. That flexibility and empathy meant the world to me.

Thanks to Taylor’s dedication and guidance, my family is now thriving in a new chapter of our lives. I wholeheartedly recommend her to anyone in need of legal help. She is not only a skilled attorney but also a compassionate advocate.

Highly recommended! Darryl Thompson and Rich Hall were fantastic helping me with my case. They communicated with me each time there was new information and did a lot of background legwork to get a positive outcome. Thank you both for all you did to help me!

We appreciate the forwardness as the subject was already sensitive to begin with. We are glad to have Taylor represent us. So thankful :-)

From the moment I met her, she made me feel comfortable and at ease, my career is fast paced and busy like hers and she made communication very easy and I was able to get documents to her quickly. She’s an incredible attorney and I’m so blessed  for her representation! Thank you for holding my hand and being there every single step of the way!!!  Forever grateful for you Taylor😊

Thanks for everything Taylor
Great People. Prompted service. Been using for over 20 years.

Taylor and Darryl Thompson are amazing lawyers + kind people. Taylor is smart, witty, timely and thorough. I was guided through a crazy legal process with the dedicated support of Thompson Law Group- thank you.

Working with Rich Hall during my court case made my life very much easier. Rich was very good about explaining how things were going to work step-by-step, what they would be doing, what I needed to do and how much everything was going to cost me. He just he just made the whole thing a lot less stressful and I would definitely recommend Thompson law group as they work with you and for you to make whatever you’re going through a lot easier and a lot less stressful.
Wonderful Attorney!!

I called to inquire about a criminal case and was connected to a "Rich" who was quite possibly one of rudest and most disrespectful individuals I've had to the displeasure of speaking to in the past few years. Taylor has been my rock during extremely stressfully situations around divorce and custody. I know I can connect with her at anytime to ask questions. She always tells me the truth with compassion. Taylor can help you too.

If you are looking for a custody/divorce attorney, look no further. Taylor was knowledgeable, empathic, and patient. She took the time to get to know me, the kids and my story, educate me on the process, did not sugar coat anything, was always well prepared for court and made sure she met all deadlines the courts required. I could not express enough how well represented I felt the entire process and how much it meant to have realistic expectations. To top it off, her office staff was also on top of it, Denali always made sure to follow up if Taylor could not. If you are in need of an attorney, I highly highly recommend Taylor Thompson.
I am so impressed with my experience with Thompson Law Group. I worked very closely with Taylor and she was awesome. Attentive and careful with my case and affordable. Thank you!!
Darryl Thompson and Ted Stepovich can help you. Just do it.
I've had a great experience working with Taylor for my family custody case. The office has treated me great and has been very respectful towards my case.

Was told by a lawyer in this office that she would share my info with Darryl and call me back. I followed up multiple times and I never heard anything back. Cold shoulder.

Just a reply telling me you didn't want the case would have been preferred as I stopped looking for an attorney when you accepted my physical paperwork, digital information and told me you'd be in touch.

Darryl is a great attorney.  Not only is he very knowledgeable with law he takes a personal interest in his clients. I have used him for five years for business and personal matters. I have always gotten above and beyond service and sound advice from him and his staff.

Nope!!!!
I had around $500,000 + in assets that I soley paid for during my marriage.  Darrell Thompson was my representing lawyer.
I walked away with: assets = 2 old snowmachines and a 1983 motor home.
A quarto retirement was my gift, that I may never see.
To top it off, his paralegle (Michelle)  was willing to sell my grandmothers house for my ex, she did real-estate on the side.
I lost everything.

Unethical, lazy, pampas.
I lost everything and paid him. Please don't do the same.
Straight forward man excellent character trust him completely

Darryl and his staff are very professional. They helped with what ever questions I had.  I believe that Darryls level of expertise and experience helped in our situation.  I would recommend Darryl if asked by friends and family.

The best law office!!!! Everyone is super helpful!!! Every time I needed legal help they resolved my problem in seconds!!!! Totally recommend them. Absolutely love them and im completely calm because no matter what happens I know they will resolve me problem and will do everything that’s possible!!!!!

Went thru the Darryl Thompson a couple years ago after my not at fault head on car accident with an AK Cab van that shattered my heel and injured my fiances spine. During the whole process my fiance and I had to practically do all the leg work that we were paying the INCOMPETENT attorney for. He lliterally never once took us serious" we constantly had to call hospitals and insurance companies to keep them in sync with the attorney. He did about $5,000 worth of work but got paid 6 times that.. "Whenever I saw him he had his legs kicked up on his desk relaxing." When it was time to collect the settlement I was pretty much forced to accept the first offer, and as soon as Darryl got his cut of the settlement he just completely stops working on our case and pretty much ignored us so long that my fiances bills from the car wreck went to credit collections and screwed her credit. WOULD NEVER RECOMMEND this law practice to anyone who has serious issues, because they are not serious about helping...
Looking for help with a case look no more Darryl Thompson is definitely your guy

DO NOT USE THIS GUY!!!
HE CAN NOT TELL THE TRUTH!!!
PATHETIC LOSER!!!
Daryll doesn't sugar coat things, he tells you what you need to do and what can happen. He's worked on many cases for family and friends and hasn't dissapointed us yet.
Darryl helped us in a few smart steps on eviction! Was referred to us by the Property Management Agency that used his help a lot. :) And simply a great guy to deal with.

Mr. Wilson is a compassionate, knowledgeable lawyer. He always knew what needed to be done and when and I was never left questioning any aspect of the case. He took all the time I needed for answering questions and explaining everything. Many thanks to all of his supporting staff.  You all helped me immensely and I very much appreciate it.

Andrew Wilson and his staff were extremely professional in handling my case.  He was always available to answer my questions and concerns.  He was well prepared at the Workers Compensation Tribunal hearing and consequently we received an outstanding result.  I wouldn't hesitate in recommending him.
*****

After going back and forth with Workers Comp, I contacted Rehbock and Wilson where I spoke to Andrew Wilson. Andrew was completely upfront about any obstacles we might have to overcome but was optimistic. Andrew found where I hadn’t received some of the benefits I should have and help get me the medical treatment I needed. Andrew and his office always made sure I was informed of every step of the process and understood it. Without Andrew, I would not have received the compensation I was entitled to or the medical treatment I needed. I would recommend Rehbock and Wilson, specifically Andrew Wilson, without reservation.

10/10 recommend Andrew Wilson. 3.5 years working with him as our representation and he has been nothing short of honest, hardworking, incredibly intelligent and truly knowledgeable in multiple areas. Fighting an uphill battle from the start, his confidence in his approach to our winning of the case never waivered and proved to be the key to our success. Thank you, Andrew!
Mr. Wilson is on top of his game.
Lazy and worthless.

Following a work related shoulder injury 3 years ago when employed in Alaska, my employer predictably controverted my claim.  Frustrated, I turned to Rehbock & Wilson where my case was accepted by Mr. Andrew Wilson who amazingly, within 2 weeks, had successfully resolved my case.  Without Mr Wilson's kind, professional services I would not have received a much needed shoulder replacement surgery.  What's more, during the recovery process my claim was again controverted by my former employer.  I contacted Mr Wilson who once again generously offered his services and for a second time successfully represented me, ensuring all my medical entitlements were immediately restored.   Rehbock & Wilson has effectively delivered for me, twice, the opportunity to continue my life without worries of financial ruin because of my work injury and inability to continue my former employment.  I enthusiastically recommend for all on the job injured employees to seek the skilled and compassionate services of Rehbock & Wilson!

I retained the law firm of Rehbock & Wilson to represent me for a Worker’s Compensation injury suffered in 2016. I worked specifically with attorney Andrew Wilson and his competent staff throughout the process including our initial consultation, signing of documents, email/phone updates, and negotiating strategies regarding my case.

I can tell you Mr. Wilson’s open line of communication throughout and his assertive negotiating skills not only gave me the assurances I was looking for regarding having retained a top quality attorney, I also found my settlement agreement to be much better than just satisfactory.

Mr. Sutherland was great to work with. We were able to push my case back with plenty of time for me to save money and get through my ordeal in an easy fashion. I recommend for anyone who needs more time to clear their heads and make up for their mistakes.

Mr. Sutherland has been a gem! He knows how to navigate through cases with ease and prestige. I have had his help through the last few years his knowledge of law deserves  a perfect 10 plus 5 stars ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

I am immensely grateful for Mr. Jody Sutherland's outstanding legal support during a difficult time in my life. His unwavering dedication and expertise played a pivotal role in securing custody of my children after a challenging separation. Mr. Sutherland's professionalism, strategic approach, and genuine concern for my family's well-being made the entire process smoother. I highly recommend his services to anyone in need of a compassionate and effective family lawyer.
Jody was straight up with me and told what could happen then went to court and represented me in a very professional way.  Thanks Jody!!!

I had the privilege of working with Mr Sutherland on my case which was extremely difficult and I am beyond grateful for the exceptional legal representation I received. Mr Sutherland demonstrated remarkable expertise, professionalism, and dedication throughout the entire process, ultimately resulting in the dismissal of my case.

From our first consultation, I was impressed by Mr Sutherland’s extensive knowledge of the laws in Alaska and how quickly he was able to get certain things about my case resolved quickly before the hearing. He listened to my concerns and explained the legal process, ensuring that I fully understood my rights and options.

Thanks to his diligent work and legal acumen, my case was ultimately dismissed. This outcome has had a profoundly positive impact on my life. I cannot thank Mr Sutherland enough for his tireless efforts in vigorously defending my rights and ensuring justice was served.

I wholeheartedly recommend Mr Sutherland to anyone in need of a skilled and dedicated attorney. He is a true advocate for clients, and his expertise and commitment make him an invaluable asset in navigating the legal system. I will forever be grateful for Mr Sutherland’s exceptional representation and the successful resolution of my case.

Thank you, Mr Sutherland for your outstanding legal representation and for giving me my life back!

THIS GUY STILL PRACTICES LAW!!! Not Good! I was looking for a family law attorney & came across Sutherland in the Anchorage Bar Association. Jody is a crook! Stay away! I used him years ago for family law, paid him a whole retainer & he only did a few hours work & THE DAY OF MY COURT TRIAL HE DIDNT SHOW UP, I CALLED HIM & HE SAID HE WAS IN THE CARIBBEAN ON VACATION AFTER HE TOLD ME HE WAS GOING TO BE AT Court w/me. His excuse was he used all my funds w/o telling me. He got paid a whole retainer & didnt do any work(just a little). JODY SUTHERLAND IS A BAD LAWYER & A BAD GUY! STAY AWAY!!

Would absolutly recommend using Mr Sutherland for anyone looking to have someone represent them in the courts in Anchorage. Mr Sutherland was very Kind, generous and responsive. He genuinly cares about his clients success and makes every effort to make sure the outcomes are positive. I am so happy i found him as i never delt with a court system and did not know what to expect. Call him and you will not regret doing so

Jody talked to by husband for 15 minutes, billed our legal trust for 2.4 hours or $600 and blew us off for 2 mo. promising every two weeks to have something for us.  Once we complained, he suddenly had an opening to discuss further.  We said no thanks as we seems to be of little concern to him but please send the work you have done and we have paid for and I sure hope it is worth $600 (but I suspect not).  I hope to come back and confirm later.

After 2 months of waiting you would expect the full probate package but when asked he said... no, just 2 basic wills forms for which this afternoons meeting would help flush out.  OMG.  What a colossal waste of time along with a pile of lame excuses.  Person answering phone is only a service and cannot even take a message, can only send you to voicemail, so why bother.  Super disappointed in his non service, don't waste your time too.
I had Jody as an attorney and I think I am going to make an appointment again with him.
Seems like a good lawyer in a pinch 😉
I knew I choose the right Firm🫡Thank you

Cynthia Cook is an awesome lawyer and made everything easy and stress free she is on top of everything and focus on details
Chris Cromer is very supportive and helpful as well. Glad I found a good firm to handle my case.
Definitely recommend Chris and his team!

I highly and strongly recommend this firm and all associated with it. They’re all super incredible, hard-working and highly professional in every aspect. The best people I’ve met and worked with. They’re all so great at what they do! Consider them for your needs!

I had an outstanding experience with this law firm. Christopher Cromer and team demonstrated professionalism and genuine care. They were always responsive and kept me informed every step of the way. I highly recommend their services to anyone in need of legal assistance!

We have used this Law Firm for the past 35++ years.  Also many family &friends have used them.

They are very helpful and currently have great attorneys to help with many areas of law.  If they don’t handle an area, they’re very helpful to find somebody who can help you.

Thank you for all your help over the years and for many more to come.

I can’t say enough good things about my lawyer and his family law firm. They have been amazing from the very beginning and continue to be incredible every step of the way. They consistently delivered great outcomes and helped put my and my family’s minds at ease, even when things felt overwhelmingly unfavorable.

In one of the hardest chapters of my life, they guided me out of a place I never imagined I could escape on my own. Their compassion, professionalism, and dedication made all the difference.

I’ve even recommended them to a close loved one who also felt like his case was hopeless—and they delivered results for him too. I am deeply, genuinely grateful for everything they’ve done and continue to do. I highly recommend this firm to anyone who needs strong, trustworthy support.

I had an excellent experience working with Attorney Congdon and Canon. They were professional, knowledgeable, and always kept me informed throughout my case. Their attention to detail and genuine care for her clients did o hige difference on my case. I highly recommend both of them to anyone in need of legal assistance.

When life’s storms roll in, you need the strongest gear you can find. For nearly six years, I’ve relied on the same attorney here, and I’ve been nothing but happy, truly satisfied, with the guidance, results, and steady hand they’ve given me.

From mining disputes to family matters, even into creative ventures, they’ve never failed to show up with clarity, expertise, and professionalism. This isn’t a run-of-the-mill law firm, it’s a team of polished experts, each one sharp in their craft, ready to help you weather whatever trial comes your way.

If you’re searching for more than just representation, if you need someone who will stand steady with you through every storm.  Aglietti Offret & Woofter is where you’ll find it.

Because my ex and I lived in a different state, the divorce proceedings were conducted remotely, and I was full of anxiety and tension about going through it alone in English, as my second language. The lawyer who was initially in charge is no longer with this law firm, but I got the impression that "even if I asserted my rights in this country, this is what would happen in the end". However, just when I was about to give up, I received a call from Chris saying, "I'll take over your case." This phone call changed my life.
Despite our different cultures and native languages, Chris understood my background and what I wanted to convey, and delivered results that exceeded my initial expectations. This divorce proceeding was such a long-term, but even when I was anxious and felt like I was going to give up, Chris encouraged me over the phone many times and understood my feelings.
Chris is an honest, positive, and trustworthy lawyer with a strong sense of justice. That's why, when the case was halfway through, I was able to leave it to Chris with peace of mind.
Now that this lawsuit is over, I am filled with peace of mind and gratitude. I am truly grateful for all that Chris and Emily have done for me.
I believe that the first call from Chris was truly a godsend.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your kind words! We are honored to be on your team!

reviews.text: Horrible service

I had a support modification post-mediation that was with an adversarial party. With this case I’ve been managing it for 11 years, and in my 5 attorneys worth of experience, including a well retained person, the only team to serve me well was the team here.

I’m from another town and was referred by LegalShield, which they graciously honored. It’s hard to find representation when you’re in a rural region, so these two things together were very important.

As far as professional service and courtesy goes, I have never felt so well attended, and I mean by the whole team. Front desk staff, paralegal, main attorney, billing, and even the intake was smooth.

I came back for another “lack of care” case, and they didn’t pull punches on what the process could take. Leading me to abandon a case BEFORE investing in deposition or working with specialists. Iykyk, and it was one of the best set of jurisprudence reviews I’ve received.

If I had more time, I would gush about the specifics of how my attorney followed my requested lead with very sound redirections. An absolute pleasure to work with!

reviews.text:
Absolutely the worst law firm I've ever had the displeasure to deal with.  I'm a licensed professional and deal with a bunch of lawyers.  Three lawyers,... and I've been beaten down by my wife's lawyer, the judge,  and my lawyers. I even accused my last last lawyer of representing my wife,  while I paid his bill.  If you choose this firm,  you'd better know the laws better than them... but then they won't represent you if you do.  One of the staff lawyers quit,  the second agreed to a strategy and then went against it in court.   That cost me tens of thousands of dollars. The third lawyer revoked his representation because I called him out for his poor representation.  And to top it off,  the managing partner doesn't agree with his lawyers or vice versa.
The only high mark is that they wiped the $6k invoice for the flawed court appearance after i told the managing partner that i would not pay it. Good thing,  because I just finished paying my wife's lawyer a comparable amount.
Good ridence.  If I can get you on malpractice,  I will... with punitive damages to boot. The insanity from this firm has beyond anything I could have expected from my worst nightmare, coming from someone that tries to be prepared for every contingency. I've got every email and filing from the past year, so this may be fun!

Everything a Law firm should be.
Jack Weiderholt is a top notch attorney who knows the law.   Staff is excellent and easy to work with.   Prompt service always.  6 Stars.

reviews.text: If I could give things a law firm a 0 I would…

Our family has been very well represented over the last decade on everything from a contested divorce, to looking into things like medical malpractice for a family member and general legal advice on an assortment of issues. The Attorneys have been fast and professional each and every time, and we highly recommend their services, from estate planning and management, to a variety of specific business. Very straightforward and concise with both a cost estimate for the services, to concierge style representation through your most difficult of times. If they can't facilitate your exact needs they have a great list of top notch recommendations.

I found the Law Firm of Aglietti, Offret and Woofter to be knowledgeable, attentive and more than proficient at what they do.  I worked with Bob, Chris, Matt and Staff and felt as though I had a "team" supporting my children's needs throughout the entire process.  The team was honest and truthful with me regarding what to expect during the proceedings whether I liked it or not.

Bob was most interested in advocating for the children's needs and did not attempt to perpetuate conflict with the opposition to light up the attorney's fees scoreboard!  This process is gut wrenching enough without that added on.  Bob promotes civility and kindness while at the same time advocating and fighting for his client's rights.  Bob is outstanding at what he does and even more importantly to me, he is a high-quality human being.  To underscore this point - weeks after we had wrapped things up, Bob showed up at my son's football game just to share in our happiness see the results of what he had such an integral part in achieving for us.  My son had returned to his home state and was attending school and playing football with all the kids that he'd grown up with.

5 stars are not enough to reflect how the team at Aglietti, Offret and Woofter made a tough process as smooth and gentle as it could be.  I’m adding an extra star!

This firm continues to stick by me and aid me through my three-plus year family law case. Genuine, honest, professional and courteous. I have referred a friend to them and would do so again in a heartbeat.
Very professional, intellectual and helpful.
Very helpful in a sticky situation
Save yourself a lot of grief by not engaging with this firm.   You will not be well represented and your interests will not be served.

This law firm represented my interests in a business deal that went south. During every step of the legal process I was given sound advice and counsel. I ultimately got exactly what I wanted and the wrongs made against me were made right. I could not have done that without this law firms help and specifically my counsel, Christopher Cromer. Chris went above and beyond what I ever could have possibly expected. He was very professional, caring and at the same time never ever sugar coated anything. I was always aware of where the law stood concerning my case, as a result I had peace of mind. Chris is also very adept at deposing witnesses and this is ultimately what won the our case. Because he was able to bring out various contradictions and even brought to light possible purged testimony ultimately resulting in a settlement in my favor. I am very thankful and grateful. I would recommend this firm to any of my family and friends.
